name: Daria & Mike
subject: What Democrats are saying ….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Peter

Tuesday was a great day to be a Republican, don’t you agree?

Not only did team red pick up the Virginia governor’s mansion, but Republicans also swept all three of the statewide races in the Old Dominion. What’s more, a REPUBLICAN WOMAN became the first woman of color ever to be elected to statewide office in Virginia’s 400-year history.

Needless to say, the results of Tuesday’s election have sent tremors across the Democrat world. Some DEMS are in denial (what’s new) and some realize how much of a threat Republicans pose at the ballot box next year...

_“**what we’re talking about is not resonating with voters.** ”

“**Nobody elected him (Biden) to be FDR, they elected him to be normal...** ”

“**This is 2009 all over again**.”

“**The only benefit {Democrats} have over 2009 is knowing just how bad it can get**.” _

The trio of Republican victories in Virginia sent such shockwaves through the political world that one political forecaster downgraded not one, but four Senate races from “lean Democrat” to “Tossup”!

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f65ec8a2b94d4c168c07f66d7a62333f&_e=UY3M85E73pZ278gH-2sdbnxSoBlCwOA3mkELRWtv_lO65w6SyST1QUZoqwGT0CUWS6evY5AOqBV0IhE6aa13v9CJUgup2rgYF6l8TZ1v36dgG_Ct2ujLsgf9b7ePmqh2EN6K_xBtx3VBdziq37gEOLZ2MuKAznKNpu8p9gKB5SzHXM-oms3nkrw6pqTS1A_CnaGDuklfnjcqcRG-UGlz77gtxV_kuDnPGQfhcUy7hGqlWJopoM0dO6AO3isTDO4uj5F07k0A2IY4QXfIGvH_NmlT2_gPmgtu5_wNM6dISr3OEavc0Hga8WW_fva9p_isSfHz3BLJG4N-bFuY0P4JlEouu5f7WQCZNvddznW6urQ723MuW6JtJ8ukXadvBEFVUhrbajz_pIEo6gn1_0YAFIrc4CKlgr0dgh7FAHdVh03m1s4ajIAvdOMjNB9V4T2hrTCL8PFk7MBwKrFT8cpuGLhwuOHALvj3x7fK_Lpcw8A%3D)
We are counting on your help to make sure that 2022 is in fact exactly like 2010 – one of the best years for Republicans in recent history.

In honor of the three major Republican victories on Tuesday, would you do us a huge favor and chip in $3 or more toward our efforts to flip the Senate Republican?

We have the wind at our backs and we simply cannot afford to lose any momentum.

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Welcome to Team Ronchetti
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Ronchetti for Governor
body:
Thank you for joining Team Ronchetti! I am so glad to have you on board and part of our team. I am running for Governor because it is time for...... Peter, Thank you for joining Team Ronchetti! I am so glad to have you on board and part of our team. I am running for Governor because it is time for leadership that represents our values! Together, we will tackle the most important issues facing New Mexico: reducing crime, securing our border, giving our children the education they deserve, ending reckless government spending, and protecting your freedoms. I am encouraged to have your support, and I look forward to working with you to take this fight all across our great state. This race won’t be easy. I will need top supporters like you to take a stand and help me fight for our common-sense conservative values. [**Can I count on you to chip in anything you can right now?**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=2d287a3f1ba14db99a6c0ce6bf54581a&_e=flQ-t9GhB-0aMhtpLXi3n_ctc7_Brr7Hh_adxKt2D_nZS6mhCy85G2WEBnnGhHyCWtirq53YqfwDLUDpM41z8kRkKwHEtACFVqGlzt_v77Vv-yT6K4yi-2BGI47oYIMYgvNZm-TynrwailknYcrJ3vBP24NHPHYKVeczL9n1YxKBaY50DTFAX9XtGfRefho_6pPE7U_BP9BHYhIDb855P4HJnJ_o5HrXob5leZ5b9OcAUpkeUeRN2-uF-VOGHwJR2HpT0HrtEKXMW_yevz6qoUgZkOi8e1PV3yLKko1Iv7miXommxOkBtZ8VPwU2j8eN9fm1-B8-BLIMzFpA8mLTSxsw2L4HZaZN4_Zk3V8JpjUTxZGvQUZlVnTbamlenW_sM094vljKUeWd9RQx-fulGTN26WVKL_JGfhYU7ds-VtGShFPL9mZ13IQqbKjTUPwptRTqyvXRkusDtvXzofavfLgWX2KLdx2Mizn6hFpawX9GwyT8GkQV_FXAU9ULzoVWgcxf0aChHkONEN1v3IYSlpfb0cK0_n5_vjQ71Eo2vGg%3D) [**CONTRIBUTE NOW**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=2d287a3f1ba14db99a6c0ce6bf54581a&_e=flQ-t9GhB-0aMhtpLXi3n_ctc7_Brr7Hh_adxKt2D_nZS6mhCy85G2WEBnnGhHyCWtirq53YqfwDLUDpM41z8kRkKwHEtACFVqGlzt_v77Vv-yT6K4yi-2BGI47oYIMYgvNZm-TynrwailknYcrJ3vBP24NHPHYKVeczL9n1YxKBaY50DTFAX9XtGfRefho_6pPE7U_BP9BHYhIDb855P4HJnJ_o5HrXob5leZ5b9OcAUpkeUeRN2-uF-VOGHwJR2HpT0HrtEKXMW_yevz6qoUgZkOi8e1PV3yLKko1Iv7miXommxOkBtZ8VPwU2j8eN3wBMNdoUA4dOpoxtO_OQ6akT3usSU_iicc9oW5Df_6nqlD1wHlsZ96I1nFr5pPt-87ac8eggkHrsun1Un2GXbyAjljkt7P0xlGgTGWCCwIaStuUyKrjniN2j6TDpARYxBXc_XU4bDakYjFqZm02XJGzv67WPsQvTGuAV2v8v96PURuN78NagKPvnpNL7schr7QXX0D8X7_Zlz1T_SCfHHEDmoeskNzzGgBvjiPWAmM8%3D) New Mexico deserves a governor who is on their side. name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Republicans Are Winning!
body:
Democrat leadership has been incompetent. [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ciukhit-yddjllujiu-r/) Patriot,Did you see the recently released poll? [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ciukhit-yddjllujiu-j/) [Take Back the House!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ciukhit-yddjllujiu-t/) **Republicans are winning on the issues!** Joe Biden and Democrat leadership have been incompetent from day one. From the crisis at our Southern Border to the chaotic withdrawal from Afghanistan and now rapidly rising prices on everything from gas to groceries, the Biden agenda has been nothing short of disastrous.I am committed to fighting back against the radical Biden Administration to protect our way of life here in Wisconsin and across our nation. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Regarding my re-election campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58706781:J9-bgB2sN:m:1:3253819041:B63E5970C2DE28AE3037ED8B43CAAA9E:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: National Republican Polling
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhjqmcu6ju1pvh0m1ro275nhfctoiudpfunn2m70_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge4p76cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z7a5ggp6g8ngoacsck5mq6jd1bcntttdj0n7vqf8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge4p76cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zb8po5hkhmc39o0vihoof93tk62jbsncrhfqnef8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge4p76cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar.
_Sponsored message_
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuv4oro1utar5fbj0969n2019mhj5v3m4eq802vo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge4p77cth2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical—same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked “facts” to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation’s history—a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen—echoing what she learned in school. And when she’s challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as **invalid** , **hateful** , and even **racist**. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I’m not surprised—I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation’s history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of “oppression” and “injustice” but an **exceptional nation worth defending**. This young lady is an ** _informed citizen_**. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. **I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership?** You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the State of American Education** using this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/informed-citizen-survey/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkltffsdpoones84m0vbjie5ce1v8v9av945lsk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge4p77cth2bs) This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it’s too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the “state of knowledge” in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.** The goal of this new campaign we’re leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” either deliberately deceived or who just didn’t receive about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government.** That’s because we’re seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation’s history—a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen—echoing what she learned in school. And when she’s challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid , hateful , and even racist. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I’m not surprised—I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation’s history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of “oppression” and “injustice” but an exceptional nation worth defending. This young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership? You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the State of American Education using this secure link: This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it’s too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the “state of knowledge” in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. The goal of this new campaign we’re leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” either deliberately deceived or who just didn’t receive about a proper understanding of American history in school. You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government. That’s because we’re seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on the State of American Education today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | | | | | | | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf6cotb9bm7jv2a8krj3dq4hig20ltthmp0dsjgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge4o71cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6sb5mljr5djjm1gb2d756er6as9kciq7ac3gepgn6sr1egoj2pr1mhrj1c756urt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6cd776komfdr4copb1cj26pp2bs)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze107lpm172btpn5lfj54vvkt1t7hc1fdrb38rso_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge4o71cjh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztquds5k88ser2k6tbd77he0imhrkm1l09h9ebmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge4o71cjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zndna071l18cp5s6ke15q1k3pm9pan2f8l540fi8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge4o71cjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Thomas Jefferson
subject: Message from beyond the grave
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Americans for Liberty
body:
We have some big battles ahead of us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zt0f7lc74mav1m7i261d1ik9h9ifbaa7qm68819o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onnmco62d37cqrb2dhl6aqbeotn6urj6tjim4rr4s74mlp78sb562rr8o5gs9ge0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dj66jjjad37maomcc5gm9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z54t5lh95tb7kk6in1ffkm2jdt4octbp0bb1mj68_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)
_" I have sworn upon the altar of God, eternal hostility against every form of tyranny over the mind of man." \- Thomas Jefferson_

Friend, Thomas Jefferson is one of our greatest Founding Fathers, a fierce defender of liberty, and a wise man... but sadly he is not the author of this email.

My name is Sean Themea, and I serve as the Chief of Staff for Young Americans for Liberty.

This is one of my favorite quotes from Thomas Jefferson. _Do you see how he stresses ETERNAL hostility against tyranny_? Jefferson realized the battle between liberty and tyranny would rage for hundreds of years beyond his lifetime. It is CRITICAL you and I continue to fight for liberty... or we allow tyranny to win.

**Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is making Thomas Jefferson proud.** YAL is the most active and effective pro-liberty youth organization advancing liberty on campus and in American electoral politics.

[**Please support Young Americans for Liberty by sponsoring our top student activists. You can help them fight for liberty, defeat cancel culture, battle big government on campuses nationwide, and help YAL students turn out the vote for liberty candidates by clicking here to donate $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or ANY amount >>>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ziecmed54srqn6lpt9e7uji38v96bfimtq1pd2rg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)

What are YAL student activists doing to make Thomas Jefferson proud?

**Here 's how it works: **

* **First:** YAL recruits tens of thousands of students across college campuses. These students join an active YAL chapter where they fight back against tyranny on campus.

* **Next:** YAL takes the top student leaders and brings them to premier training events. The students are equipped with the skills and knowledge to transform their campus and fight for liberty candidates or causes in the legislature.

* **Then:** Thousands of student activists make phone calls, knock on doors, and turn out the vote for liberty-minded candidates running for office.

Our student activists have accomplished the following:
* Helped elect 179 hardcore pro-liberty legislators
* Repealed 76 unconstitutional free speech "codes" on campuses
* Helped pass constitutional carry in Texas

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: You need to see this to believe it
body:
As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Cri
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zio6fkva6aakd0iaq73qht3m9p6cf978no5llcug_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmm3gm0p34m4rr2sb2ehpj6p9meaqr8o3jelp72ttk6eqrad74smp64dhge1p6fduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dj66jjjad37maomcc5gm9h3csh5u)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjam90ih7vg7vsgloi02b1t7gj6rsndl7tlcs1c8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)
---
Fellow American, As I travel the country, I talk with many Americans who worry that the next generation is being brainwashed by the racist “Critical Race Theory” agenda of the radical Left. But hear me on this: I can tell you, from firsthand experience, that there is _GREAT_ reason for optimism! **Turning Point USA recently launched our Exposing Critical Racism Tour** , a no-holds-barred effort to fight back against the racist Left on college campuses. And so far, it has been one of our most successful tours _EVER_ _!_
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z33hjhjeukqfg1ll7tr6iq1vobemsj5k9p6pj43o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)
---
But with four dates remaining (and the potential for more to be added!), I want to ask for your help to make the most of this tremendous live event. [**Can I count on your generous, tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more today to help us continue promoting the Exposing Critical Racism Tour, executing these live events to their fullest potential, and supporting these students to ensure that our presence has a lasting impact on their campuses?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1if8fnenvpjigd8ro1u6qmjk06cjvr9b7eonoio_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztn1en2gfvd74il2spqp6djsgurt6htkv4i9b580_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)
---
I’m including a few photos of some recent events in this email, because you really need to see the enthusiasm among these young patriots to believe it. _**_THOUSANDS_**_**of college students have come out to these events -- even on some of the most Left-wing college campuses in America. We even drew a sizable crowd in Burlington, VT a few days ago!** And these students aren’t just coming to be entertained. They’re being equipped with the facts, the arguments, and the encouragement they’ll need to stand up to their college administrations and professors, and to take on the racist ideology of the radical Left wherever they encounter it. Because, as I’ve said many times, _if America doesn't kill Critical Race Theory, Critical Race Theory will kill America._
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z97nl5measqb3n3tlc542urcq6ptan60s67tlhng_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)
---
That’s why we're going right into the belly of the beast by visiting college campuses with the _TRUTH_. [**Will you help us continue this vitally important tour with your generous gift right now?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcken47mrbi24uklab596u9jrtpesoit8l65ojp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs) Your gift will enable us to fund the travel expenses for my team. It will cover the cost of the promotional work that will bring students in the door. It will help provide transportation for students to off-campus venues when we're not allowed to meet on campus due to draconian COVID restrictions (a challenge we have dealt with a few times already). **And it will help fund TPUSA chapters on these campuses and many others, so that conservative students in hostile environments can sustain their camaraderie and support for one another long after the event is over.** Many conservatives have written off places like the University of Vermont or the University of Oregon. They say they're too far gone... too steeped in radical Leftism. And that's _PRECISELY_ why we're going there on this tour. For many students, this event may be the only exposure they get on their college campus to the truth about Critical Race Theory. Already, we're seeing just what’s possible when we carry the truth into those dark places. Students’ eyes are being opened. They’re finding their courage. They're fighting back against the poison of Critical Race Theory, socialism, and Marxism and standing up for our pro-America values in some of the most hostile environments in America.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpiitanpfu7ilcab1ek4mb0r16r32mdbrd3rrsa0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)
---
[**Will you help us reach even more of them with your much-needed gift today? Please click here to pitch in your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, or whatever you can possibly afford.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zms7tk26aeo55ogsa45fggcl3n76eofpduoqp47o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo1h9tjtoru7fcfnaqs3ll9amfct2ofvvd51ocu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ge1oj4chh2bs)
---
Thank you for standing with the next generation! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: KathyJo Boss
subject: Reminder: Extending Mask Mandates Is Unnecessary
body:
Let's Refocus on Children's Education
| | | |
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
Last week, the Mass. Department of Elementary and Secondary Education (DESE), extended mask requirements for our children in public schools until to January 15, 2022. The statement was issued by press release and no questions were taken.

It's clear, now, that state government is using the mask mandate as a way to push parents into making the decision to vaccinate their children, despite reasonable reservations parents may have with the efficacy of the shot and the fact that kids are the least vulnerable population - there are ZERO fatalities under the age of 18 in Massachusetts.

As a mother of two children, I worry about the long-term effects of these vaccines on our kids. There is no long-term testing and we know so little about possible side effects. Heart inflammation in young boys and fertility issues with young women are some of the problems we're hearing about.

The fact that our public schools have are using coercion to get to the removal of mask mandates is also a huge concern for me and many parents I have spoken to. Kids are at low risk of contracting or spreading COVID and wearing masks to school only suppresses their emotional and social development. Worse than that, masks actually increase the risk of respiratory infections and are proven to impede breathing. Mask wearing and vaccines should be optional - parents should make that decision for what is best for their children.
The U.K., Ireland, Scandinavia, France, the Netherlands, Switzerland and Italy exempted children from masks in classrooms and have not experiences more school-related outbreaks than the U.S.

Why aren't we following the science when it comes to documented proof that masks are not needed?

Please join our campaign in pushing back against these continued mandates on our children. Our Commonwealth needs to re-focus on the tremendous education gaps that have occurred due to the pandemic and stop wasting resources on forcing parents to vaccinate their children against their wishes.
|

---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
[Diehl for Massachusetts ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011VNsnF9CSgasot8zn-m50JYKoCVlASf5kMVkJyYJvkgih9sdWBguCbxD-3kUxWTD1Im8jSrekEqJ_-nJySTYyZx_EtqxRzXcSkN6mMwhvHA3Kysj1Xx3p45CmfX8kvlAAbYdZ5TiZ4ian7GIyjdfJxye8sNtUt9n_vobZI52NXW1it0mXgxklw==&c=JyYvKZOMz8lfP3evBXybXTRtfrtXCcYBUgaPB6WUfJEKgIr7wLbmRw==&ch=x3RZKzQQ8aHCXxyT9NgwQFJyMImeEyCC2FaN49czivsijpz5QPxtlQ==)

name: American Defense News
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfskgndo6hui6lldckemvaoojfg83rpmqhrgor4g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr35d72chqned5lecq79dlhcjgn8tb4mdor2sb0ssojat5k65pm4tb6mmojcs3gcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3impj39p5l6orrepj66hgb4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6cdh69pj0sdg649fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmerdal4ipd0en73p75cu8h8td6bf74jlae1lm2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ieco73c1h2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical—same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked “facts” to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation’s history—a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen—echoing what she learned in school. And when she’s challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as **invalid** , **hateful** , and even **racist**. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I’m not surprised—I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation’s history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of “oppression” and “injustice” but an **exceptional nation worth defending**. This young lady is an ** _informed citizen_**. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. **I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership?** You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the State of American Education** using this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/informed-citizen-survey/**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs3rf7gt8r32nhrpifrqvss4nmp004p5iqn0ku20_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c9ieco73c1h2bs) This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it’s too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the “state of knowledge” in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.** The goal of this new campaign we’re leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” either deliberately deceived or who just didn’t receive about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government.** That’s because we’re seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgolptk8en5q7qm8gsrnj5lflqv5p2bhhqg28m08_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdh69pj0sdg649fg)

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Welcome to the team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38383438/315213098/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1009-ot-welcome&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NGI4YTViZS1kNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEgpsWLdvSQxWfkJyDnrBizZqcJW6qkQuJH5trFzP6E=)
---
Hi, Peter – it's Gov. Lujan Grisham.
**I'm working toward a brighter future for the Land of Enchantment, and I'm so grateful to have you on my side.**
During my time in office, I've led one of the most successful vaccination programs in the country, invested in public education, and cut taxes for working families. Our grassroots movement has already accomplished so much, but there's still more work to be done.
That's why I'm running for reelection. **I'm fighting every day for the people of New Mexico** – and I'm so heartened to know that grassroots supporters like you have my back.
**Strong grassroots support allows me to sign bold, progressive policies into law** , like the legalization of cannabis – which will spur the local economy and end the war on drugs that disproportionately harms people of color.
When I make big decisions like these, I listen carefully to the people of New Mexico – and I can promise you that I'll never stop fighting for what the people need, no matter how hard the Republicans push back against our policies.
I really appreciate having you on my side, and I look forward to building a better future together.
Now, let's get to work, Peter.

Michelle Lujan Grisham

Gabe is a first-generation American who was born and raised in the borderlands. Through his Mother’s eyes, he saw the hard work and sacrifice that it takes to fulfill the American Dream. But through his career in public service and his time spent traveling across southern New Mexico, Gabe realized that for most of us, the American Dream is slipping away.
Gabe is a champion for economic justice, equal pay for equal work, immigration reform, affordable housing and high-quality healthcare for all, and providing New Mexicans with meaningful and equal opportunities to raise their families and pass their traditions on to the next generation.
Gabe has spent his career dedicated to public service, serving his community as a Las Cruces City Councilor, as a staff member for U.S. Sen. Martin Heinrich, and helping to protect New Mexico’s environment and public lands as an avid conservationist.
**Gabe is running to bring real results to the people of New Mexico’s 2nd District and flip this seat from red to blue in 2022. But he can only do it with a strong grassroots team of supporters backing him up from the beginning.**
**[Will you help us take this critical House seat back from the GOP and give southern New Mexicans a leader they can count on by contributing as a founding donor today? Any amount will make a difference!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38385979/315216871/1013005707?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211004welcome_tv_new_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWRiMDMxYi1kNzNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8HVRVw7Az8sqoA0yi6JaViLVKrvbJd0SGyoe2kuxmzU=)**

body:

| | Peter, The Republican Party and Liberty University are illegally conspiring against our LGBTQ community. A group of 30 former students filed suit recently claiming that Liberty University uses its massive federal government entitlements— which totaled over $723 million in 2018— to push conversion therapy on its LGBTQ students. Liberty also pressures its LGBTQ students to tell its priests their full teenage sexual history only so they can be told their identities will lead them to “years of unhappiness and ultimately to hell.” Liberty University is a kingmaker in the Republican Party. Ted Cruz launched his 2016 campaign for president at the school. And Donald Trump received a “hero's welcome” there the same year, which helped him consolidate the Evangelical vote and defeat Hillary Clinton. Don't miss this crucial connection, Peter: by conspiring with Liberty University to streamline federal funding, torture LGBTQ teenagers, and rally Evangelical support around their increasingly radical candidates, the Republican Party has proven that it will work outside the law to oppress our LGBTQ community at every opportunity. We'll take on all of Liberty University's Senate GOP boosters who covered up its conversion therapy campaigns and streamlined federal funding. We'll make sure no LGBTQ teenager is ever forced into absurd conversion therapy because of Republican Senators ever again. That means replacing Christian fundamentalist Marco Rubio with progressive champion Val Demings in next year's midterms. That means picking up every seat we possibly can in 2022 to expand our razor-thin 50/50 Senate Majority. And that means hitting _tonight's_ $1,100 fundraising goal. We're asking you to step in and help us end this insidious conspiracy, Peter. We need to hit our critical fundraising goal by midnight tonight. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Sen. Grassley accepted Donald Trump's endorsement at "the most alarming Trump rally yet"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Moments like this show why our campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley is so important
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38390617/315228194/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjE2ZjkyNS1kYzNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jk2-j-tgmKBJ5umClVXjR_zLgXuIN3-6OxwWaNvYiKQ=)
Peter – just recently, Donald Trump held a rally in Iowa that a CNN opinion piece calls**"the most alarming Trump rally yet."** During his speech, Trump welcomed my opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA), to the stage, praising Sen. Grassley for always being there whenever he needed him. **Then, he gave Sen. Grassley his "complete and total endorsement," which Sen. Grassley enthusiastically accepted.**
Moments like this show why our campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley is so important – and why I need to ask for your donation to stay on track with our fundraising for the month. But before I do, I hope you'll let me explain.
You see, this rally has political commentators especially worried because top-ranking Republicans, like Sen. Grassley, are making their allegiances clear. Instead of choosing facts, reason and our democracy, they're choosing Donald Trump – the man who incited a deadly riot on our Capitol. But frankly, I'm not surprised at my opponent's actions. Sen. Grassley has a long history of advancing radical ideas at the expense of our country.
Just look at his time as chair of the Judiciary Committee, when he blocked President Obama from appointing a Supreme Court justice and then rammed through the controversial confirmations of Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh. It's not shocking to me that he'll happily defend Trump's attempts to overturn the election and put our democracy at risk if it helps further his radical agenda.
We have seen as clear as day that Sen. Grassley will stand by Trump no matter what – and that Trump is all in to protect Sen. Grassley. **Together, they'll do everything they can to take back the Senate and reclaim the White House. Our race here in Iowa is critical to stopping them. **
That's why I'm asking you to support my campaign, Peter. You see, I'm about $15,000 short of where my fundraising should be for the month. With Trump and Sen. Grassley working hand in hand to keep Iowa red and take back the Senate, we cannot afford to have shortfalls like this. **[Please, can you donate $5 – or whatever you can spare – right now, so we can defeat Sen. Grassley, protect our Senate majority and stop Trump in his tracks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38390618/315228201/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjE2ZjkyNS1kYzNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jk2-j-tgmKBJ5umClVXjR_zLgXuIN3-6OxwWaNvYiKQ=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38390619/315228208/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk381-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjE2ZjkyNS1kYzNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jk2-j-tgmKBJ5umClVXjR_zLgXuIN3-6OxwWaNvYiKQ=)

Thank you for always standing beside me, especially in moments like these.

– Abby

body:

Folks,
In the wake of Republican Glenn Youngkin’s victory, my team and I asked if you’re still feeling confident about Democrats’ chances of winning in the 2022 midterms -- and the results were... mixed.
Some folks are still feeling confident, while others are doubtful that Democrats can pull off wins up and down the ballot.
But, there was one piece of heartening news from this survey -- despite doubts about the 2022 midterm elections as a whole, **a majority of you are still _very_ confident in my chances of holding my seat!**
I’m also confident, team. As long as I have all of you in my corner, I know there’s nothing that we can’t achieve.
**So if you’re going to take away anything from Virginia’s election results, let it be this: We need to start ramping up our campaign for 2022 right now.**
Early investments are crucial for preparing for anything our opponents throw at us. As a top target of the National Republican Congressional Committee, I’m already getting attacked and national Republicans are prepared to spend millions to unseat me.

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Will you take a moment to hear me out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
The governor’s soft-on-COVID stance has been costing Florida for the better part of two years. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38392977/315241717/-1399758842?refcode=20211107_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjY2NTczNi1lNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qi28A_9lmwqAKyOjOFIvS9hybbBDe09Kg_i3bXLdcmQ=)

I won’t beat around the bush, friend: I’m writing to ask you to **[pitch in to my campaign and help us defeat Governor DeSantis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38392978/315241726/-1399758842?refcode=20211107_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjY2NTczNi1lNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qi28A_9lmwqAKyOjOFIvS9hybbBDe09Kg_i3bXLdcmQ=)** And if you’ll take just a moment to hear me out, I’ll tell you why your support at this key moment is so important.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38392979/315241733/-1399758842?refcode=20211107_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjY2NTczNi1lNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qi28A_9lmwqAKyOjOFIvS9hybbBDe09Kg_i3bXLdcmQ=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38392980/315241740/-1399758842?refcode=20211107_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjY2NTczNi1lNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qi28A_9lmwqAKyOjOFIvS9hybbBDe09Kg_i3bXLdcmQ=)
The governor’s **soft-on-COVID** stance has been costing Florida for the better part of two years. And now, we have a dangerous new surgeon general who thinks it’s ok to let kids with COVID into the classroom (yes, really). If we don’t defeat Governor DeSantis next year, there’s no telling what will happen.

Now here’s the good news: Recent polls show me neck-and-neck with the governor, or even **flat-out beating him.** Floridians aren’t happy with the way the governor has bungled this crisis, and they’re looking for steady leadership to get our state back on the right track.

But the governor won’t go down without a fight. His **far-right billionaire funders** \-- many of whom don’t even live in Florida -- will spend big to keep him in office. It’s our job to build a grassroots campaign that can fight back and win no matter how much money they spend.

**That’s why I’m coming to you right now, friend. If you can, will you please pitch in to my campaign today to help us build the operation we need to defeat Governor DeSantis? Any amount will make an enormous difference.**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: We're being dangerously outspent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I don't like delivering bad news, team, but **Republicans are outspending us nearly 2:1 online.** The GOP has been flooding New Hampshire with attack ads to defeat me, and there's no end in sight. So far, Republicans have spent over $4 million as part of their plan to flip the Senate red, and they've promised that there are millions more on the way. With one far-right candidate already running against me and McConnell's handpicked opponent expected to jump in at any moment, we cannot afford to fall behind. **[Before I go any further, can you quickly rush $5 to protect this critical Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38393133/315242643/-1803038125?refcode=e20211107_mwh-outspent&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWFmYjk4Ni1lNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7eWOovFt_UoEQLd1A3sE2Vwl1vtLTgbuXOuthOnO9uw=)** Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mwh-em-nov21](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38393134/315242644/-1803038125?refcode=e20211107_mwh-outspent-link&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWFmYjk4Ni1lNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7eWOovFt_UoEQLd1A3sE2Vwl1vtLTgbuXOuthOnO9uw=)** The path to the Senate runs through New Hampshire, and Mitch McConnell will do everything in his power to take back the gavel. But I'm no stranger to tough races. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes -- less than half a percentage point. I know that we can hold this seat and protect our vulnerable Senate majority, but it's going to take a grassroots effort. **[So I'm humbly asking: can you chip in $5 today? What you give will help my team build a robust on-the-ground campaign, allowing us to communicate with voters across the Granite State.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38393135/315242645/-1803038125?refcode=e20211107_mwh-outspent&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWFmYjk4Ni1lNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7eWOovFt_UoEQLd1A3sE2Vwl1vtLTgbuXOuthOnO9uw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38393136/315242646/-1803038125?refcode=e20211107_mwh-outspent-el&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWFmYjk4Ni1lNTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7eWOovFt_UoEQLd1A3sE2Vwl1vtLTgbuXOuthOnO9uw=)

name: Team Malinowski
subject: Tom’s email from yesterday →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Hi there,

Did you see this message from Tom?

With just over a year until the midterm elections, we could really use your help! Please make a donation right away to help us raise another $13,001 by tomorrow at midnight →

[https://act.malinowskifornj.com/a/one-year-2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38393538/315244985/1474767723?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211107_1_7&refcode2=bf489772-e83f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjQ4OTc3Mi1lODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_sQRvhmMP5B4W-i8LsK7vW1M9VaRBe44ANffWxtfBM=)

\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---

Folks,

On Friday, your Congress kept its promise, and passed the biggest investment in American infrastructure and jobs in our country’s history. Democrats delivered, despite our incredibly narrow majorities in the House and Senate. And we were only able to do it because you elected us by the narrowest possible margins in 2020!

As you know, I won my election by 1.2% last November — the smallest margin of any Congressional Democrat. My opponent from that race is running again. And I’m not just up against him. The GOP’s dark money groups have already spent over $1 million in our race — yes, more than a year out — because they know it will help decide who controls the House for the remainder of President Biden’s term. That’s why, with election day just a year away, I need your help!

Thanks to your support in protecting our House majority, we’ve lowered the cost of health care for millions of people and cut poverty in America by almost half. The Build Back Better bill we'll pass later this month will make caring for our children less expensive, lower the cost of prescription drugs, protect the planet from climate change, and give every middle class family a tax cut (including the SALT deduction!).

Congressional Republicans have tried to stop all of this. The few brave Republicans who supported the bipartisan infrastructure bill are being hounded out of their party. Their leaders, from Kevin McCarthy to Marjorie Taylor Greene, stand for nothing but power.

[The GOP’s roadmap to power goes right through our district. So to stay on track, we need to keep building and demonstrating the grassroots strength to win again. That’s why we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $20,000 by Monday at midnight. Everything we raise will help us go head to head with Tom Kean Jr. for a second time and to fight the GOPs constant attack ads. Will you please help us close our budget gap by Monday at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38393539/315244987/1474767723?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_211107_1_7&refcode2=bf489772-e83f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjQ4OTc3Mi1lODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y_sQRvhmMP5B4W-i8LsK7vW1M9VaRBe44ANffWxtfBM=)
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately:_

Congressional Republicans have tried to stop all of this. The few brave Republicans who supported the bipartisan infrastructure bill are being hounded out of their party. subject: what if?

body:
What if Republicans take back control of the U.S. Senate and Mitch McConnell gets his post back as Senate Majority Leader?
#

Folks —
Ever since we got the results from last week’s elections, we’ve been thinking...
What if we don’t win this primary and Democrats end up nominating someone who can’t excite and turn out voters next November?
What if Republicans win this election and Pat Toomey gets replaced with someone even worse for working families than he is?
What if Republicans take back control of the U.S. Senate and Mitch McConnell gets his post back as Senate Majority Leader?
Sorry to put all of these dark thoughts in your head, but that’s what’s at stake in this race.
But what if you knew your contribution today could help elect Malcolm Kenyatta to the U.S. Senate?
By the time you read this, some else will have stepped up to fuel Malcolm’s path to victory, and now they’re hoping you’ll do the same.
[Could you please make a $3 contribution to elect Malcolm Kenyatta to be a champion for working families in Washington? clean_body: What if Republicans take back control of the U.S. Senate and Mitch McConnell gets his post back as Senate Majority Leader? Folks — Ever since we got the results from last week’s elections, we’ve been thinking... What if we don’t win this primary and Democrats end up nominating someone who can’t excite and turn out voters next November? What if Republicans win this election and Pat Toomey gets replaced with someone even worse for working families than he is? What if Republicans take back control of the U.S. Senate and Mitch McConnell gets his post back as Senate Majority Leader? Sorry to put all of these dark thoughts in your head, but that’s what’s at stake in this race. But what if you knew your contribution today could help elect Malcolm Kenyatta to the U.S. Senate? By the time you read this, some else will have stepped up to fuel Malcolm’s path to victory, and now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. = = Thank you, Team Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Winsome Sears: Huge Win for Black America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58707121:JccQyZ2Nd:m:1:3253819041:2510B3FA106C0D677408E0973D0A5B8D:r "Headline") Peter: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58707121:JccQyZ2Nd:m:1:3253819041:2510B3FA106C0D677408E0973D0A5B8D:r "Winsome Sears")**The next for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia, Winsome Sears, is:**
* A Woman
* Black
* Marine
* Conservative

**_If the Democrats were smart, this would terrify them._** They have spent generations telling black people and women that they can never get ahead unless the old white men in the Democrat Party allowed them to, but I think you know that they refuse to learn from their mistakes. Winsome is one of the thousands of Black Americans who have seen the truth and are ready to fight through their lies. **[2022 will be a massive Red Wave for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can't stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58707121:JccQyZ2Nd:m:1:3253819041:2510B3FA106C0D677408E0973D0A5B8D:r "2022 will be a massive Red Wave
for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can’t stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did
to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58707121:JccQyZ2Nd:m:1:3253819041:2510B3FA106C0D677408E0973D0A5B8D:r "Rush")You may not recognize my name, James Golden, but you probably know me as Bo Snerdley, the one-time producer and call screener for Rush Limbaugh. **Working with Rush for nearly two decades has confirmed the truth about liberals:_they HATE it when Black people in America dare to think for themselves._** I started the New Journey PAC to support candidates like Winsome - Black Conservatives who understand that the modern Democrat Party doesn't care about Black America and does nothing to help us. The New Journey PAC was all in on Winsome Sears, but our work in Virginia was only the beginning - **[the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of support to every Black Republican running for office, but we can't do anything if we don't have your support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58707121:JccQyZ2Nd:m:1:3253819041:2510B3FA106C0D677408E0973D0A5B8D:r "the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of
support to every Black Republican running for office, but we can’t do anything if we don’t have your support.")** Rep. Bryon Donalds, Rep. Tim Scott, and Joe Collins- these are just some of the Black Republicans we are supporting in 2022. We saw what the Democrats did to Winsome Sears - what do you think they will do to these patriots when they get desperate? [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58707121:JccQyZ2Nd:m:1:3253819041:2510B3FA106C0D677408E0973D0A5B8D:r "Black Republicans") We have to be ready to FIGHT BACK. **[The New Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a massive difference in one of these races.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58707122:JccQyZ2Nd:m:1:3253819041:2510B3FA106C0D677408E0973D0A5B8D:r "The New
Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a massive difference in one of
these races.")** **We can change the future of our nation by Making Black America Republican Again in 2022, but we need your help to make it a reality.** **[Please join us today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58707121:JccQyZ2Nd:m:1:3253819041:2510B3FA106C0D677408E0973D0A5B8D:r "Please join us today.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58707121:JccQyZ2Nd:m:1:3253819041:2510B3FA106C0D677408E0973D0A5B8D:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38394576/315250632/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTMzMmQ0Mi1lZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i2Oal3F9vh7rQUTwqlgbCCJq8g9yc5w2pamsUt5igh0=)
**"Ras is uniquely qualified for this challenge."**
_\- Charlie Hodges in Bleeding Heartland_
Team,

With Virginia behind us, Democrats across the country see the importance of investing in bold leaders running on popular policies -- from urban to rural communities -- especially here in the Midwest.

On that note, we want to make sure you didn't miss [**this opinion piece**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38394577/315250634/501140687?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTMzMmQ0Mi1lZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i2Oal3F9vh7rQUTwqlgbCCJq8g9yc5w2pamsUt5igh0=&emci=f587d53b-ed3f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=55332d42-ed3f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21044445) from activist Charlie Hodges in Bleeding Heartland. Hodges makes the case that Ras is uniquely qualified to be the Democrat taking on far-right Republican Kim Reynolds. That's because we've thrown away the conventional campaign playbook.

We're not writing off any person or community, even those deemed "too red" or too apathetic. We're traveling to every corner of the state, talking (and listening!) to everyone, to find common solutions to our problems. And, we're building the political power we need to achieve them.

We're confident we have what it takes to win, and we welcome Charlie and thousands of other supporters from across Iowa and the country to our team. Please consider reading it, then making a contribution to our campaign using the button below if you agree.

As always, we appreciate your support.

\- Team Ras

subject: Drop whatever you're doing! This is the most important email this year...

body:
President Trump just said we're totally unprepared. We need to respond right away before it's too late to do anything about it.
Drop everything, Peter:
**FIRST:** Biden CANCELED all border Wall contracts...
**THEN:** Biden let millions worth of Wall materials waste away...
**NEXT:** Biden promised huge checks for illegal immigrants...
**NOW:** Fox is reporting a "massive caravan" heading right toward us!
_This is an emergency situation so we'll cut to the chase:_
**[**Before midnight tonight -- we're BEGGING for all Patriots to help us build The Wall, defeat the open-borders Democrats, AND save America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711398:6VnNCZ2lN:m:1:3298722022:8C68025EF18CFB6D46DBA559B0256BC0:r)**
President Trump just said we're totally unprepared. We need to respond right away before it's too late to do anything about it.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711398:6VnNCZ2lN:m:1:3298722022:8C68025EF18CFB6D46DBA559B0256BC0:r)
**[Send In Ten Bucks](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711399:6VnNCZ2lN:m:1:3298722022:8C68025EF18CFB6D46DBA559B0256BC0:r)**

**[Send In More](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711398:6VnNCZ2lN:m:1:3298722022:8C68025EF18CFB6D46DBA559B0256BC0:r)**
Everything we as Conservatives believe in is at stake right now.
If Joe Biden and his Democrats get away with their open-borders agenda, it's all over. **The future of our great country is hanging in the balance.**
So we're asking for your help ONCE MORE before it's too late.
[**Will you help us build The Wall and save America?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711398:6VnNCZ2lN:m:1:3298722022:8C68025EF18CFB6D46DBA559B0256BC0:r)
To victory,
**BREAKING BORDER NEWS **

We're coming to a major benchmark in this campaign, team: **365 days out from Election Day.**

If we play our cards right, that means we'll have another year of historic Democratic turnout, thwart the Ohio GOP's voter suppression plans, and flip Ohio blue. But in order to do that, we need to be working hard every single day to sound the alarm on the bad maps and bills that will hand over total control of our democracy to one extreme party for another decade.

In fact, one of those bad bills will affect us a year from today.

Historically, Ohioans turn out in record numbers on the Monday before Election Day. But right now, the legislature is working to pass a bill that will cut the final day of early voting.

That's why Chelsea is on the frontlines in the battle to protect our democracy and flip Ohio blue. **She'll fight for Ohioans to make voting easier, safer, and fairer so that the people truly have a voice in our government.**

**But to make transformational changes in Ohio when the polls close in 2022, we must have massive voter turnout. So we wanted to ask you: Are you planning to vote in the 2022 Election?**
| [YES »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38394748/315252122/-509293941?refcode=EM_OC_211107ayearandaday_ED_TC_7_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmQzYjk2OC1mMDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADq8_n7LOQN3GMz3JxWvYZdc19U1mtKPUyoNkvXSedo=)

Team Chelsea
| | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. subject: If our extreme opponents win, it will be a setback for North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
The bipartisan infrastructure bill passing Friday night was a clear reminder of what’s at stake in 2022
#

Hey folks -
The bipartisan infrastructure bill passing Friday night was a clear reminder of what’s at stake in 2022 and why this race in North Carolina is so important.
This bill, which had bipartisan support, will grow good jobs for North Carolina and upgrade our infrastructure.
And guess what? Ted Budd and Pat McCrory opposed it.
Their opposition to legislation that will strengthen our economy and invest in our communities is an affront to North Carolinians and the latest example that they will not and cannot serve the people of our state.
[**We cannot afford their backward thinking in the Senate. Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today to turn North Carolina blue and keep these extreme Republicans out of the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38394980/315253267/-1761473262?refcode2=9cac26e6-f33f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211107-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2FjMjZlNi1mMzNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xJRiy0MtMLlFnCWsgvUvKRu9LzIrxui7loJmAkeQx1k=)
Our extreme Republican opponents in this race would be a huge step back. Pat McCrory and Ted Budd would rather put partisanship above the needs of the people of our state.
So it’s up to all of us to work together to stop them.
\- Cheri Beasley

clean_body: The bipartisan infrastructure bill passing Friday night was a clear reminder of what’s at stake in 2022 Hey folks - The bipartisan infrastructure bill passing Friday night was a clear reminder of what’s at stake in 2022 and why this race in North Carolina is so important. This bill, which had bipartisan support, will grow good jobs for North Carolina and upgrade our infrastructure. And guess what? Ted Budd and Pat McCrory opposed it. Their opposition to legislation that will strengthen our economy and invest in our communities is an affront to North Carolinians and the latest example that they will not and cannot serve the people of our state. = Our extreme Republican opponents in this race would be a huge step back. Pat McCrory and Ted Budd would rather put partisanship above the needs of the people of our state. So it’s up to all of us to work together to stop them. \- Cheri Beasley = * Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
