name: ICYMI News
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis o
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaanebkl3l5cm05n195kdt8novnr1tmcj62un028_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34clh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkfq983ru1ub0f7mt00l0ovmmbsbjdgi98cs1gt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34clh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zshjdsslov74d2dve8smqkpaju8nk6q2934mh7no_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34clh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc63ms58mihjo8t6llqjaqftj7j11biab4glt3go_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34clh2bs)**
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9pq9kb7q9p32p96gos116mnrg5bfo3dtmcmk5kg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34clh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z012l2coctdkqtlsgducpdkl4fqeq2fnpk5gm4v0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4onhe4oj8s33eppjao5jc3j64ohks6p6ecb5eqqe0tjkm2qeatbim9jj2crnmkon0oh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeq92he9nctpgkpkr7p4di4o3tockpcv2o6fdlco_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis o
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrng5337h3uup5tgnelj97ts96e91asm68aksemo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2o3kekp3ap9lehqmat31c8r7bdb56apn2d1je2q62pj0cljr1d5gcaorfdr4e1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6cc3n6di6fdj1coqm1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphmco30s1i62oh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf61esqm2givaismmcbecphpoko0hvgrn21s4dog_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34c5h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkdten37a5li42vhjglgjrbfekbtput1tcipri80_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34c5h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zers33l72b67qn0bgc5lb3oi429laot4ml6837ro_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34c5h2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z30tg4p9tcplahdglohu961hu4ma7ic6gh2ugri0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cpg61o34c5h2bs)**
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z3e3vqisvf059hcrn2llba6ml2bm18573i2juth0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zog78llnvjc8suuf4f1cotnugj7e2l9653qbrubg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdj60o70chgm49fg)

body:
|
---

| | [**_I know you don’t normally hear from a candidate’s mom, but I promised my son, Tony, I’d lend him a hand today. Tony’s fighting to flip this important seat blue for Democrats, but right now he’s coming up $6,723 short of his End-of-Week Goal. It’ll be tough for him to run a winning campaign if he has to make budget cuts._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396144/315258787/1129282168?refcode=20211107_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk2N2NjYS1mODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiToSutjVV_CBmX772TkBm_7jYTFCsttzZ4AhACDQyA=) [**So I'm personally asking: If you support Tony, will you chip in $10 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396147/315258789/1129282168?refcode=20211107_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk2N2NjYS1mODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiToSutjVV_CBmX772TkBm_7jYTFCsttzZ4AhACDQyA=) | | [Chip in $10 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396148/315258792/1129282168?refcode=20211107_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk2N2NjYS1mODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiToSutjVV_CBmX772TkBm_7jYTFCsttzZ4AhACDQyA=)
---
Even though I’m Tony’s mom, I’m only being *a little* biased when I say:
[**_Tony is our best shot at winning this critical race for hardworking families like ours._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396150/315258793/1129282168?refcode=20211107_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk2N2NjYS1mODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiToSutjVV_CBmX772TkBm_7jYTFCsttzZ4AhACDQyA=)
Now let me tell you why:

My husband Antonio and I immigrated here from Peru to give Tony and his brothers a better life.

For most of Tony’s young life we lived in poverty, but that didn’t stop him from defying the odds.

Tony worked hard to make it to college and become a teacher to support kids like him.

But when he saw families like ours were still getting left behind, Tony knew he had to do more.

When he told us he was running for the state Legislature, we were a little worried.

In Peru, only the elite ran for office and Tony was facing a tough race.

[**But he defied the odds again and won.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396151/315258795/1129282168?refcode=20211107_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk2N2NjYS1mODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiToSutjVV_CBmX772TkBm_7jYTFCsttzZ4AhACDQyA=)

[**_I know unseating Republican Congressman Don Bacon won’t be easy -- but I know Tony’s the right person for the job. For him to defy the odds again, he has to be able to fund a winning campaign. Please chip in $10 to help him pull it off. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396152/315258796/1129282168?refcode=20211107_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk2N2NjYS1mODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiToSutjVV_CBmX772TkBm_7jYTFCsttzZ4AhACDQyA=)

When Tony won, I saw that everyday folks had a chance with a fighter like him in their corner.

When local businesses and families struggled due to the pandemic, Tony fought to secure COVID relief funding.

_While Don Bacon voted against it in Congress._

When property taxes soared, Tony voted to lower them.

_While Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and corporations._

And when Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers, just like his dad.

[**_As a State Senator, Tony has never forgotten where he came from -- and I know he’ll do the same in Congress. But he can’t do it alone. Don Bacon already has a $260,000 lead over Tony. Hitting his $6,723 End-of-Week Goal is so important to keep up with Bacon and keep his campaign running at full speed._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396153/315258797/1129282168?refcode=20211107_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk2N2NjYS1mODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiToSutjVV_CBmX772TkBm_7jYTFCsttzZ4AhACDQyA=)
[**I’m personally asking, one last time:
If you believe in Tony like I do, can I count on your $10?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396154/315258798/1129282168?refcode=20211107_em_fr_b1_lv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk2N2NjYS1mODNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oiToSutjVV_CBmX772TkBm_7jYTFCsttzZ4AhACDQyA=)

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund and Latino Victory Fund.

clean_body: | | | = = | | = Even though I’m Tony’s mom, I’m only being a little biased when I say: = Now let me tell you why: My husband Antonio and I immigrated here from Peru to give Tony and his brothers a better life. For most of Tony’s young life we lived in poverty, but that didn’t stop him from defying the odds. Tony worked hard to make it to college and become a teacher to support kids like him. But when he saw families like ours were still getting left behind, Tony knew he had to do more. When he told us he was running for the state Legislature, we were a little worried. In Peru, only the elite ran for office and Tony was facing a tough race. = = When Tony won, I saw that everyday folks had a chance with a fighter like him in their corner. When local businesses and families struggled due to the pandemic, Tony fought to secure COVID relief funding. While Don Bacon voted against it in Congress. When property taxes soared, Tony voted to lower them. While Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and corporations. And when Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers, just like his dad. = = | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for supporting my son, Tony. Abrazos (hugs), = = Tony's (very proud!) name: Adam Schiff
subject: A big f-ing deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — A year ago, all of us were sitting at home awaiting the results of the presidential election. We were worried, scared, and anxious...to say the least. I was at the American Legion Post in Hollywood taking in the results with friends and supporters on a big screen in the parking lot. Our eyes weren’t always glued to the TV, like many, I was watching Twitter and my texts hoping, praying, for good news. And when we finally heard that Joe Biden won the election and that Trump would finally be leaving the White House, there were spontaneous celebrations in the streets. It was a moment full of promise, but also full of determination to do the hard work. That hard work began immediately and hasn’t stopped. It hasn’t always been pretty — _ok, let’s be honest, making new and consequential laws that bring about change is never pretty_ — but it has been necessary. More than necessary, it is vital to moving the country forward. There is a constant give and take, and you never get everything you want. But Friday night, we finally passed the bipartisan infrastructure package. And when I was walking off the House Floor at 12:30 am, it was through a sea of smiling faces. Progressives, moderates, and those in between. Shaking hands, fist bumping, relieved that we were able to finally get this over the finish line. **_As President Joe Biden would “elegantly” put it, it’s a big f-ing deal._** It’s going to mean millions of jobs. It’s going to mean billions in investments in roads, bridges, public transit, and safety. It’s going to mean a nationwide electric vehicle charging network. It’s going to mean billions for rail – which “Amtrak Joe” appreciates. It’s going to mean clean drinking water and investments in water resilience. It’s going to mean broadband for rural and poverty-stricken communities. It’s going to mean renovations to our airports and ports. It’s going to mean billions in clean energy. For those not watching every twist and turn of this legislation, you might have forgotten how much will get done with this $1 trillion bill. **_But our work remains unfinished. We made a promise to the American people that we would invest in them. In our people. In our “human infrastructure.” We will pass the reconciliation Build Back Better package this month._** It’s going to be the biggest investment in fighting climate change ever — over $500 billion for clean energy jobs, cutting greenhouse gas emissions, and so much more. It’s going to be the biggest investment in families and childcare in decades. Universal pre-K, cutting childcare costs for working families, and helping end child poverty. It’s going to be the biggest expansion of healthcare since Obamacare. Reducing the cost of premiums, expanding Medicaid, and covering vision for those on Medicare. It’s going to lower taxes for middle-class and working-class families. It’s going to lower prescription drug costs by allowing Medicare to negotiate over price with the big pharmaceutical companies. And we’re going to pay for it by making billionaires and corporations pay their fair share. This is a make-or-break moment for President Joe Biden. For our House Majority and the Senate Majority. _Failure is not an option._ If we don’t demonstrate that the government can work — for the people, for those we’re trying to help — we will reap what we sow. And once we pass it, we need to sell it to the American people. Because the infrastructure and Build Back Better packages will be the greatest investment in our people in generations. _A new, New Deal, if you will._ We can deliver to the American people. We did so Friday night, and we now need to finish the job. We need to get it done. Let’s get it done. — Adam **P.S. If you’re as ready as I am to fight for these monumental legislative achievements and ensure that voters know that Democrats are trying to help people before the midterms, please consider pitching in a donation today. It can make a real difference. Thanks for being in this fight:** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396219/315259142/-751938712?refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20211107_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDNhMTE0My1mOTNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ZpcOFjmN1Kb-jPrJ84x-dbdRs65ebSOGmeS_2JSoEo=)

Peter, Dr. Fauci needs to resign or be fired NOW.

**FIRST:** I grilled him over the summer regarding his support of the Wuhan lab and their dangerous, threat-to-humanity gain of function research.

**THEN:** He lied to my face. He denied funneling money to Wuhan and said he never funded gain of function - even when thousands of documents proved otherwise.

**NOW:** He's trying to change the definition of "gain of function" to cover his own ass. And I'm not letting him get away with it.

**Let me be clear: no amount of smarmy word salad will get Fauci out of the fact that he lied before Congress and should be fired NOW.**

**[I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711420:6aKh2Z2NM:m:1:3298722022:EA2BDCE680B2BF4C6C73817FA42D6774:r) **

The fact of the matter is that Fauci has lost the support of the people.

The only one who doesn't realize it... _is Dr. Fauci. _

He spent our taxpayer dollars on gruesome, animal torture.

He spent our taxpayer dollars paying labs in Wuhan to create artificial super-viruses.

With every suspicious activity he's approved of, it's truly a miracle that the world isn't facing something much more fatal COVID-19.

If we don't fire this guy now, we might not be so lucky the next time.

We have to get this guy out, now. I'm doing what I can as a Senator but I need to prove to the bureaucracy and the Biden administration that we've truly had enough.

Please, join me to FIRE FAUCI by chipping in now:
[**FIRE FAUCI: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711420:6aKh2Z2NM:m:1:3298722022:EA2BDCE680B2BF4C6C73817FA42D6774:r)

[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711420:6aKh2Z2NM:m:1:3298722022:EA2BDCE680B2BF4C6C73817FA42D6774:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711420:6aKh2Z2NM:m:1:3298722022:EA2BDCE680B2BF4C6C73817FA42D6774:r)
We need real consequences for men like Fauci who recklessly abuse their power.

**[Together, we can make sure that happens.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58711420:6aKh2Z2NM:m:1:3298722022:EA2BDCE680B2BF4C6C73817FA42D6774:r)**

Add your name ASAP>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396590/315261578/1891761376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODY2YjMyNS1mZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxJAgEBSpSKmksWKp-VLwI2d3t6JFp34xHNB6WN0f9o=&emci=b597351f-fd3f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a866b325-fd3f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396591/315261579/1891761376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODY2YjMyNS1mZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxJAgEBSpSKmksWKp-VLwI2d3t6JFp34xHNB6WN0f9o=&emci=b597351f-fd3f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a866b325-fd3f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
---
Look, we always knew we couldn’t trust the GOP to draw maps that would fairly represent the people of our state.
**But the legislative maps they approved last week are simply absurd.**
They guarantee Republicans will control about 75% of our congressional districts, despite the fact that our state is a 50-50 state. They also guarantee the GOP will maintain their majorities in both chambers of the legislature.
**[Sign our petition right now to DEMAND fairer representation in our legislative maps>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38396592/315261580/1891761376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODY2YjMyNS1mZDNmLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxJAgEBSpSKmksWKp-VLwI2d3t6JFp34xHNB6WN0f9o=&emci=b597351f-fd3f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a866b325-fd3f-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)**
Thanks,
Team Cooper

**\----Original Message----**

> ---
> Peter — we’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: We won’t stand for partisan, gerrymandered redistricting in North Carolina.
> Right now, Republicans are pushing through maps that would GUARANTEE them control of 70% of our congressional seats — despite the fact that our state was split nearly 50/50 in last year’s presidential election.
> This plan doesn’t represent North Carolina, Peter — but more than that, they ensure that we’re headed for yet more court battles over our state’s legislative maps.
> Democrats and our allies have taken the GOP to court **three times** in the last decade because of their partisan, unconstitutional gerrymandering, and they lost _every single case_. We will ALWAYS stand up for North Carolinians’ right to elect their own representatives — rather than have elected officials choose their voters.
> _You’d think they might have learned from their mistakes._
> Look, we’ll fight these battles all over again over our new maps if we have to, but it would better serve the interests of hardworking North Carolinians if the GOP would just work with us to deliver fair maps in the first place.

subject: re: Republican gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
Peter, this headline just stopped us in our tracks:

Republicans poised to rig the next election by gerrymandering electoral maps

This is all part of Republicans’ EVIL plan to steal the House Majority from Democrats!

If we don’t stop them now, Joe Biden’s presidency will be DOOMED and Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene will DESTROY our Democrats.

Quick, rush $3 right now to stop Republican Gerrymandering! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q42021_df-biden]

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q42021_df-biden]

As you read this, Republicans are starting to draw their own maps in key swing states like North Carolina, Wisconsin, and Ohio.

If Republicans succeed in creating cookie-cutter districts that ONLY benefit them, we’re guaranteed to LOSE pivotal elections for the next decade.

But if you rush $3 to our anti-gerrymandering campaign, we can end Republican election meddling and SAVE our elections. » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q42021_df-biden]

We need 2,300 of our supporters to make the right decision and pitch in $3 now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q42021_df-biden]
Republicans may have far-right strategists and billionaire MAGA donors, but we have something better:

A real grassroots movement full of hard-working Americans ready to defend Democrats.

And we have no time to waste as Republicans try to rig our elections in their favor. If we sit by and do nothing, the GOP will rig elections for the next decade , Peter.

But if 2,300 Democrats take action NOW, we can stop GOP cheating for good!

So please, Peter, we need you to act. Pitch in $3 to combat Republican election meddling and stop far-right gerrymandering before it’s too late » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ud_q42021_df-biden]

name: Holly HQ
subject: Beat the Odds
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] https://www.hollyforcongress.org [https://www.hollyforcongress.org]

Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Reminder: Biden admin will give BIG money to illegal border crossers?!?
body:
Are they insane?
---
| | | | | | Volume 15 | November 3, 2021
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
Almost one-half a million dollars each, and some families will receive $1 million.

That's what the Biden Administration wants to pay those who crossed our border illegally during the Trump administration and were separated from their families in the process.

According to the Wall Street Journal, "The U.S. Departments of Justice, Homeland Security, and Health and Human Services are considering payments that could amount to close to $1 million a family, though the final numbers could shift, the people familiar with the matter said." In myriad cases, these families amount to one parent and one child, the Journal also said.

Like most insane Democrat ideas, it sounds so kind, so sweet. However, these people entered our country ILLEGALLY! The United States is not some magical money-tree that can endlessly bear the world's burdens. Nor should we!
Joe Biden and our entire elected leadership's duty is to put Americans first; to protect our national sovereignty and to make this a thriving nation with our children as beneficiaries.

These payments would come at a time when our national debt and deficit are climbing to extreme heights that put our own citizens at financial risk, not to mention imperiling our children's future. These payments are even greater than what a family member receives in insurance payments ($400k) if a soldier is killed in combat. That is unconscionable and I am outraged at this proposition.

Gas prices are up 40% from last year, home heating costs are expected to surge up to 50% more this winter and inflation is out of control; all a result of our radicalized government's ridiculous and destructive policies.

The radical Left is putting foreign invaders above its own citizens, and it will drive even more people to cross our borders against our laws. The madness we see in D.C. must stop. We cannot afford to fund every social cause at the expense of our own lives.

Please support me in stopping this insanity. Donate to our cause and put me in a position as US Senator to end these outrages.
|
---
| | |
---
| Sebastian Gorka "America First" national radio show
---
| | |
---|---
|
This week I discussed several issues such as getting out to vote with Tron Simpson as he was filling in for Sebastian Gorka on the nationally known "America First" radio show. You can hear the discussion here:

* Friday & Saturday Nov 5&6: Annual African Summit. 5:30pm at the Field House 1600 Federal Blvd in Denver. Tickets begin at $50

Campaign Update
---

---|---
|
The past week was eventful. I spoke at the Conservative Meetup in Arapaho and attended the Larimer County Lincoln Day Dinner featuring Charlie Kirk.

The messages from Charlie, Ron Weinberg (Larimer County GOP chair) and others were particularly uplifting and inspiring.

I was grateful to meet several people who care about our campaign and were interested to hear how I intend to restore integrity to the US Senate.

This week, I will attend the sixth annual African Summit in Denver, and then join the Colorado Republican Party for the Centennial Dinner in Colorado Springs.

Please come say hi to me if you are attending one of these events.

name: Gary Black
subject: Here's Something Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/bc713c4f1fa2b256c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Friend, What a week! We saw signs of the Red Wave that's to come, Team ’22 saw big crowds across the state, and the Braves brought home a World Series!
---
---
# **_Congratulations Braves!_**
---
---
MLB took the All-Star Game out of Atlanta, but no one take this World Series title away. Congratulations to the Braves on a B.I.G. and well-earned championship!
---
---
# **_B.I.G. Event In Watkinsville_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/39684063f4cd2963c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
B.I.G. thanks to everyone who joined us in Watkinsville last night for our Believe In Georgia tour stop! Great crowd filled with friends old and new. Our grassroots network is unmatched and it's going to carry us to victory.
---
---
# **_Red Wave_**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/e0cad3ee9cb1b444c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
On Tuesday night — in Virginia and across the country — voters send a message that they aren't going to stand for Biden and the Democrats' plans to fundamentally change America as we know it. It was a huge win and a sign of what's to come in Georgia next year — _**if we put forward the Republican who can defeat Raphael Warnock.**_
---
---
# **_Leadership Georgia_**
---
---
We had an incredible time at last night’s Leadership Georgia Gala in Savannah. Congratulations to all of this year’s graduates, including Brent and Mandy Marable, the parents of our Oconee County Team ’22 leaders John David and Jack Durham. Enjoyed seeing them, as well as our friends Michael Harrison and Elberton Mayor-elect Daniel Graves, who leads Team ’22 in Elbert County. We also caught up with many other Team ’22 leaders — including Will and Ember Bentley (Upson), Eric and Molly Cohen (Grady), and Drew and Shelly Echols (Hall). I also couldn’t be prouder of our daughter Caroline and son-in-law Kyle. Y’all have earned great respect from Leadership Georgia members statewide.
---
---
# **_Join Us In Middle Georgia Next Week!_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/263980035a2a7533c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Our Middle Georgia tour stop is coming up TOMORROW and it's not too late to claim your ticket! We're going to have a great crowd, and I especially want to thank everyone on our host committee for their strong support and hard work. You don't want to miss this event. [**Claim your ticket here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/47d3f11e29646f93c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
# **_One More Thing_**
---
Please follow our campaign's [**Facebook**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/2f3937478a6690b5c3d6b838967d376c/37793), **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/3e24d9bff6271029c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** , and [**Instagram**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/873dfe4c3d1880b5c3d6b838967d376c/37793) pages if you aren't already, and make sure 10 of your friends are too! Our campaign is firing on all cylinders, but for that to continue, we must keep up our fundraising efforts. The need is real and it's crucial to our success. [**If you haven't already contributed, please do so now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/8dd186ef34fb336cc3d6b838967d376c/37793) Thank you again for your friendship, prayers, and support! More good news to come next week.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/87d38ee78e19fde7c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/6430a35ecdd30551c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate here or below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/83a4e1bd32748163/a87278b1f87211d9c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=83a4e1bd32748163&d=3ed6f7acf6a1f3fac3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=83a4e1bd32748163).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

Maryland’s next governor needs to take the climate crisis seriously, and John King is committed to making our state a leader in climate action and environmental justice by creating thousands of good-paying green jobs, educating the workforce of tomorrow, and rapidly expanding public transit across all of Maryland. **Here’s a sneak preview of what’s included in John’s plan:**
* Achieving Net-Zero Greenhouse Gas Emissions by 2035
* Providing Good Green Jobs in the New Economy
* Protecting and Restoring the Bay
* Building Adaptable and Resilient Communities
* A Renewed Focus on Environmental Justice to Ensure an Equitable Future

We hope you will be able to join us for this free event, and in the meantime you can read more about the plan here: _**[https://johnkingforgovernor.com/issue/climate/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38398266/315272820/1052240719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGVlNTNlZC0wYTQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9spS3gOIgWMyHVCeJYWNzm2KFAjLXNZBUpjN_Fx6JQ=&emci=0cee53ed-0a40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0dee53ed-0a40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635484)**_

Hope to see you on Wednesday,
Team King

clean_body: Maryland’s next governor needs to take the climate crisis seriously. | This Wednesday at 6PM we’re hosting a virtual conversation with John about his newly unveiled climate plan to make Maryland a national leader in the fight to combat the climate crisis. | | WHEN: Wednesday, November 10th 6:00-7:00PM ET WHERE: Virtual on ZOOM | | | = Maryland’s next governor needs to take the climate crisis seriously, and John King is committed to making our state a leader in climate action and environmental justice by creating thousands of good-paying green jobs, educating the workforce of tomorrow, and rapidly expanding public transit across all of Maryland. Here’s a sneak preview of what’s included in John’s plan: Achieving Net-Zero Greenhouse Gas Emissions by 2035 Providing Good Green Jobs in the New Economy Protecting and Restoring the Bay Building Adaptable and Resilient Communities A Renewed Focus on Environmental Justice to Ensure an Equitable Future We hope you will be able to join us for this free event, and in the meantime you can read more about the plan here: Hope to see you on Wednesday, Team King | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, visit his . name: Team Schmidt
subject: It was a big week.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
This past week was a big one for conservatives all around the country, and right here in Kansas. Friend, **This past week was a big one for conservatives all around the country, and right here in Kansas. ** As Patriots from coast to coast cast their ballots, they reminded the nation that we will always fight for our values – and we are ready to take back our country, our states, and our cities and towns. It was a week in which Republicans felt a surge of momentum... from Glenn Youngkin’s win in Virginia, to Jack Ciattarelli’s neck-and-neck race in New Jersey, to many great wins here in local races across Kansas. That momentum was shared by our campaign as well, as we added some great new endorsements to Team Schmidt.
We wanted to share what this past week’s endorsers had to say about Derek with you, [**and give you a chance to join them by chipping in.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=1936a764fa884018ad45e4b8cb3147d7&_e=RwToVrfaTKKfal2IKUFvHzsCMR0mQpFp18oDIQuBTWte1YvhbYyc7ignA_RxbbmN-Qcz0Ytx8qmltg4OhsTjUeEQiyZ9EJ2bPemTbC9X7-9iK94_PpunpD74zTRY5N-OmfeGpjmeGJ5Djzyok-3cV9GTBwzrNAFvaEDRRZ5_OOG86frYDGDC5MW6qUAr5I6YASz_2bqSOL0rn-SQhayq-_yKlXh9TJkfFVH6GWsZD9CZqlHvKfql4IM9JJZ4OBSzkJ8VoTFG37I3-oVYiG2__PvhFF9LSFS6_rYRC8K7QIJ2k_B0vCzTJlSjnTFuaiBBlpL_bVnAE85EQ4dqdZeWXyGoebaNO00xl5dH2lyXwaTLFLdZuiGOMlyJxRu_se9Eu_wFGt7WANEjcOu2crtnT2sHlArGGjdw018PRILxniy8dNpE6--LlX_JVdkcfFhInOYZpCHgZq-1t_I1S5vpzk5z-0JFPZDOe9ZfBeAJ8jx3vLr8DN6uThd5WYuyD00v) [**WIN WITH DEREK**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=1936a764fa884018ad45e4b8cb3147d7&_e=RwToVrfaTKKfal2IKUFvHzsCMR0mQpFp18oDIQuBTWte1YvhbYyc7ignA_RxbbmN-Qcz0Ytx8qmltg4OhsTjUeEQiyZ9EJ2bPemTbC9X7-9iK94_PpunpD74zTRY5N-OmfeGpjmeGJ5Djzyok-3cV9GTBwzrNAFvaEDRRZ5_OOG86frYDGDC5MW6qUAr5I6YASz_2bqSOL0rn-SQhayq-_yKlXh9TJkfFVH6GWsZD9CZqlHvKfql4IM9JJZ4OBSzkJ8VoTFG37I3-oVYiG2__PvhFF9LSFS6_rYRC8K7QII_6UtwwDg5aIMYWJB0bbv7EWcmxZeIFpTEv3SXF01Qkgnx7DvPbDIUgqZWct94R6GklwazTBZzNtycdXvySKWd1gcLgp-t2lyAE1gNS-dg8PcFPbvq0Xm7dCuFgp-NJAvmRizbsQKVbMCNIxIPLwx98QVOCSJf-DCGiNhUyaDcQcoEn2FOgTBPtcvoX4FeSDOqjpN4lVLxULfe6XfjxoqL) _"As Sheriff of Montgomery County, I would like to endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor of our great state. As Attorney General, Derek shares the conservative values of the citizens of Kansas, is an advocate for law enforcement, and tough on crime. I look forward to having a true friend of law enforcement sitting in the Capitol building.”_ **–Sheriff Ron Wade, Montgomery County** _“Kansas needs a solid leader that embraces limited government, personal freedom, fiscal common sense, and family values. I’ve been personally interacting with Derek Schmidt more than a decade and know he is uniquely skilled to reestablish these principled ideals in Kansas. Please join me and support Derek Schmidt for Kansas governor in 2022.”_ **–Jim Howell, Sedgwick County Commissioner ** _“As Commissioner, one of the first events where I met our Attorney General was the opening of our new crime lab. During a conversation with Derek, I found him to be a great advocate for law enforcement; someone who was accessible to not only myself but also the citizens I represented; and someone who had a great understanding of the economics that drive Johnson County. For these reasons and more, I look forward to great things happening in Kansas with Derek Schmidt as our next Governor!”_ **–Jason Osterhaus, Former Johnson County Commissioner ** [**Will you join Team Schmidt by chipping in just $5 right now**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=1936a764fa884018ad45e4b8cb3147d7&_e=RwToVrfaTKKfal2IKUFvHzsCMR0mQpFp18oDIQuBTWte1YvhbYyc7ignA_RxbbmN-Qcz0Ytx8qmltg4OhsTjUeEQiyZ9EJ2bPemTbC9X7-9iK94_PpunpD74zTRY5N-OmfeGpjmeGJ5Djzyok-3cV9GTBwzrNAFvaEDRRZ5_OOG86frYDGDC5MW6qUAr5I6YASz_2bqSOL0rn-SQhayq-_yKlXh9TJkfFVH6GWsZD9CZqlHvKfql4IM9JJZ4OBSzkJ8VoTFG37I3-oVYiG2__Eqas84ikH93XwsivCviAyq7Et98AUXe4Z-kvb2qJ7cQcgK-mJAv7zV2Rlxpi4kLCdRWyppi-pGZQIgLx2RImnav_nv2kJWe4aiAHr1VZEzHkGYaWJnLxZwiVtUyG6MkPhfq4CfsDMXxPxZ5c9qPHZ4L0PGLUqe0fVgDtzyerBOJ_TmRvuFM1PY1CQMem9f_AERqGA0Tpi1kTY97Tih-CWoq4Gw6VyVoU8W5JGADoLQa) to help our team work toward replacing Laura Kelly and her liberal policies with a trusted conservative leader? name: Mark Kelly
subject: What infrastructure means for Arizona and the country
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When I first ran for Senate, I made a promise: If elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns, and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate.
#

Friends —
When I first ran for Senate, I made a promise: If elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns, and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate.
And what I’ve heard from people across our state is they want us to set aside our partisan differences to invest in Arizona - and the country - and create good-paying jobs.
The bipartisan infrastructure bill that passed Friday night does that. It will bring good-paying jobs to the state and across the country. It will fix our roads and bridges, expand high-speed internet, upgrade our ports of entry, make us more resilient to wildfires, and improve our water infrastructure.
I am proud to be one of the members of the bipartisan group that got this done. This is a major piece of legislation, and it’s important you know some of what’s included in the bill:
$5 billion for Arizona to rebuild our roads and an additional $225 million for bridge replacement and repair.
$100 million for Arizona to expand high-speed internet access.
More than $500 million for Arizona’s ports of entry.
And it includes critical investments for drinking and wastewater infrastructure, repairing aging dams in Arizona, public transportation, airports, wildfire management, increasing firefighter pay, woodland fire prevention, and more.
This is a bill we can all be proud of. It will do a lot of good for our state and for our country. I thought it important to write to you directly about what the legislation means.
Thank you for reading,
Mark Kelly
* * *

Can you please make a contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign? We’re facing an important mid-month fundraising deadline coming up and Mark needs your help.
[**Contribute $3 to Mark Kelly’s re-election today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211107-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1642_6688874_j9yzPf&akid=1642%2E6688874%2Ej9yzPf)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211107-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1642_6688874_j9yzPf&akid=1642%2E6688874%2Ej9yzPf)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1642%2E6688874%2Ej9yzPf).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Abigail
subject: A commitment to connection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Im51BKb3-3DBZUhBDlXArOHsrMwGHJMdRyxpuYtS9Pk=/Ov-DxsDNhSj4kLZ0dY9UGKU3slVEhD7Vk4dOGwLEheQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211107-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

As you know, one of my top priorities in Congress is to expand internet access for everyone in Central Virginia and in underserved areas across the country.

**I know having reliable access to high-speed internet is key in closing opportunity gaps in our economy and education system and in improving life for people in Central Virginia - which is why I work hard to support broadband expansion.**

Securing equal internet access for all would have a sweeping impact. As a proud public school graduate and parent, I'm committed to closing the homework gap. I know that in our increasingly digital school environment, access to reliable internet is essential in improving education for our students.

And as our economy evolves to require a strong online connection, it's important now and in the future that we prioritize internet access so we can see small businesses grow across Central Virginia.

In Congress, I've worked tirelessly to protect millions in funding for internet infrastructure for Central Virginia and improve broadband mapping so we can connect those who've been left out of the picture. **I am committed to creating a more connected Central Virginia and am a proud advocate for expanded internet access.**

[_**To help secure broadband for all Central Virginians through my work in Congress, will you contribute to my re-election campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Im51BKb3-3DBZUhBDlXArOHsrMwGHJMdRyxpuYtS9Pk=/Ov-DxsDNhSj4kLZ0dY9UGKU3slVEhD7Vk4dOGwLEheQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211107-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Im51BKb3-3DBZUhBDlXArOHsrMwGHJMdRyxpuYtS9Pk=/Ov-DxsDNhSj4kLZ0dY9UGKU3slVEhD7Vk4dOGwLEheQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211107-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Thank you for your commitment to connection,

Abigail

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Im51BKb3-3DBZUhBDlXArOHsrMwGHJMdRyxpuYtS9Pk=/Ov-DxsDNhSj4kLZ0dY9UGKU3slVEhD7Vk4dOGwLEheQ=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20211107-1-EM&amount=25)

In Congress, I've worked tirelessly to protect millions in funding for internet infrastructure for Central Virginia and improve broadband mapping so we can connect those who've been left out of the picture. I am committed to creating a more connected Central Virginia and am a proud advocate for expanded internet access. | Thank you for your commitment to connection, Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit =. If you wish to receive fewer emails, =. =

name: PrimarySinema.com
subject: One of our most frequently asked questions:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
"Where does all the money that you raise go?" | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPKmnmd6CKmn6hVZ1x5VC0TWxGoObIxKXzuEqQKQyOpGYMVfqT8KrzCXvCKJSfJjxGGIDQfL3F-v1vv10Jxk8nk3DvZJn6vrgpFXFjvAzBY-tmsXe8OG11icBCok35HC2dlvrIeH0auqCu57CRYdvsI_SetDr-eJGoVzqjKx4vTmiKwY46JNmbfFrGQqymuIikTsZK6G16zj68WyE9oUI7ykUopuEF7_cB_y9u_TXaIAJxcM4ul80orgQoCYCKodVuQ/3gt/EIeFJ0beQ5afx-se5ZL8TQ/h0/jqqGfRyNRVpPshbziqQxxJByaOYt2psxmw1tc2ZYelQ)
Peter, As a newer organization, this is one of the most frequent questions we often get from people: “Where does all the money that you raise go?” 🤔 It's a fair question, Peter, and we're happy to answer. We're not the first political action committee that's tried to primary an incumbent member of Congress, and we likely won't be the last. But here are three things that set us apart from other organizations like ours:
* **We're not endorsing a specific primary challenger — and we don't believe that it's our role to do so.** What we _do_ want to do is build the infrastructure and make the case that it's time for change in Arizona. We're working now to ensure that when a strong primary challenger does emerge, they aren't starting from scratch.
* **100% of the money raised goes to local organizations in Arizona to build this infrastructure.** Rather than trying to build something totally from scratch, we've intentionally chosen to invest in grassroots groups in Arizona who are already experts at organizing and voter outreach.
* **We're not in this for the short run. We're thinking long-term, which is why we're starting now.** Right now may be the most critical point of President Biden's term — yet Senator Sinema continues to obstruct and weaken his agenda. Sen. Sinema's actions will impact Democrats' ability to win and keep majorities in the House and Senate in 2022. We're here to hold Sen. Sinema accountable, and to show her that we're ready to vote her out.

**[So, what do you say, Peter? If you're ready to go to work and lay the groundwork to oust Kyrsten Sinema, please make a donation now. »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSyS0NiUJZImwCyVsav1MNabfjaKV1IWOV4pZS_frAqUVtCL_gwKEx9xBNVgqmTTU7gWo1mo7vzz9RHbbJ_miY6yuKvm71Tx1i8tofN8_btzeL4FO7m_-vhtt2f4aNisA5fF-Q9TrKrCqBnHnT8G8dli9cc1Qro2WJWPDqIiI8oZFzHF6qPVcWECb9pcyqmVpViSzL5JgUpvHYWv3Hc1DUYjwPu66TgF_v5j3P80-dV5BFIASSED6lvKNsLc5w8_W0Y0WbMc-5Wt2smV89p9xX4KwoDpyVB1R6MMXeA_xNGO0-G5LwcEXpoucgcJZP3g35l-0A0isekvYQlsqGpqD7yA/3gt/EIeFJ0beQ5afx-se5ZL8TQ/h1/A2IRhl5Mw6EKMlGyv8ocVl8NotDdyMO8Yx7vi-ObSN8)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSyS0NiUJZImwCyVsav1MNabfjaKV1IWOV4pZS_frAqUUV6MEGQ288ofXme8KIST6Z0483FwcfdQDWiHb62mRYjTznkvbeX4Kwq0mgUtdq_8hzXmXTHNLtbFI7Lyce0ONG5GWUssRdbY8Y3JlqKEu-XAlubof3d5yXi3FWc59jnoSXXAp-KqYy-gBp3zacYPXWrl01MnAUY5DKIl9t2UtmH1ghO-OYOxC5L0rusU89u7YaTXq7LObkvEwTvL0ce59Ssd2Kd2Esq6TEQIx3pQ5I7sUdAWdll8Tg9_8NJ7OsrG1TAKyfH4jn8B3y07T7CmERf8a4TNQaWPyXz-N2Kwe3Pg/3gt/EIeFJ0beQ5afx-se5ZL8TQ/h2/nG24zD_0DyszVjdoiZiteTj7n0ttDGjuTdm7MMqiM4I) Thank you, The Primary Sinema team

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Enough is enough
body:
It’s time to stop choosing between bad and worse. If we put Country First, it’s in our power to help America live up to our founding ideals.

| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_4&n=1)
---
Friend, Americans are tired of being forced to choose between bad and worse. Reasonable people of goodwill _need_ a seat at the table if we’re going to end the divisiveness and fix the challenges we all face. If we put Country First, the power is in our hands to help America live up to our founding ideals.

Together, we can rebuild what has made our country so special -- the power of liberty and unity of purpose. Together, we can rise above the divisiveness and fear-mongering to empower people to create real and lasting change. Make no mistake, we are building something extraordinary and powerful, and it means a lot to have you with me. Support our fight to uphold our values and keep Country First. Would it be crazy to ask you to chip in $9 today, or whatever makes sense for you, to help fuel our mission to give reasonable people a voice in our system? | [](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=OPXMP9Gjm96HPN5OSJWJsEU_YSQWEI8WCZR-SbsrVNo&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_4&n=2 "Chip in $9") [Chip in $9](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=OPXMP9Gjm96HPN5OSJWJsEU_YSQWEI8WCZR-SbsrVNo&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_4&n=2)
---
Thank you again for your time and thank you for putting Country First.
Yours in service,
Adam
Country First · PO Box 2385, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.country1st.com/unsubscribe?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_4&n=3).

clean_body: It’s time to stop choosing between bad and worse. If we put Country First, it’s in our power to help America live up to our founding ideals. | Friend, Americans are tired of being forced to choose between bad and worse. Reasonable people of goodwill need a seat at the table if we’re going to end the divisiveness and fix the challenges we all face. If we put Country First, the power is in our hands to help America live up to our founding ideals. Together, we can rebuild what has made our country so special -- the power of liberty and unity of purpose. Together, we can rise above the divisiveness and fear-mongering to empower people to create real and lasting change. Make no mistake, we are building something extraordinary and powerful, and it means a lot to have you with me. Support our fight to uphold our values and keep Country First. Would it be crazy to ask you to chip in $9 today, or whatever makes sense for you, to help fuel our mission to give reasonable people a voice in our system? | "Chip in $9" Thank you again for your time and thank you for putting Country First. Yours in service, Adam Country First · PO Box 2385, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States

subject: It’s Infrastructure Week, finally

| | President Biden’s **Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act** is a once-in-a-generation bill to create millions of jobs for Americans and rebuild our infrastructure. _**I was honored to have been in the working group that put the framework of this bill together, and I was so proud to just join a bipartisan coalition in voting to pass it in the House.**_ This legislation will provide Nevada with historic funding for roads and bridges, broadband expansion, clean energy, public transit and access to water -- and it also includes my bill, the **Large Scale Water Recycling Project Investment Act,** which will reverse Lake Mead's historically low water level. But we’re just getting started: We must now focus on passing the Build Back Better Act to invest in the future of Nevada families. Your support has allowed us to pass bipartisan, groundbreaking legislation that will truly make a difference in the lives of Nevadans. But if we want to continue this progress, we must hold onto our Democratic House Majority. [_**My seat is one of the most competitive House races in the country, and I need your help to keep it blue. Will you chip in to my re-election campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38399085/315277399/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211107_FR_INFRA_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTk4NjcwNy0xNjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6QHq9c6ZcdgFJxn6Q_-5KshjtM4sb3zPKThK_jFnspc=) | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38399086/315277400/2035241370?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_211107_FR_INFRA_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTk4NjcwNy0xNjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6QHq9c6ZcdgFJxn6Q_-5KshjtM4sb3zPKThK_jFnspc=)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Tuesday’s results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
To win Pennsylvania in 2022, we’ve got our work cut out for us.
#
Peter,
In 2020, Joe Biden won Virginia by 10 points.
Pennsylvania was a lot closer than that. 😳
Tuesday’s elections – especially losing the Governor’s race in Virginia – make it clear that 2022 could be a challenging year for Democrats. And out of all the races in the country, John’s has a chance to be the closest and most competitive — with nothing short of control of the Senate on the line.
**It will be an uphill battle and Tuesday’s results prove that to win Pennsylvania in 2022, we’re gonna have our work cut out for us.**[**_That’s why support for our grassroots campaign has never been more important._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37172?refcode=em20211107-3379&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3379%2E434096%2E-1p1Tz)
We need to build a coalition of Pennsylvanians from all corners of our commonwealth – urban, suburban, AND rural.
When John and Governor Tom Wolf ran for office in 2018, they won 17 counties **including some smaller ones where some Democrats wouldn’t even bother to campaign.** And as Lieutenant Governor, John continued to visit all 67 counties, listening to people and helping Pennsylvanians from all walks of life.
That’s exactly how we’re going to flip this Senate seat: By talking to voters in every last county, with a vision for making Pennsylvania work for ALL of us.
So if you’re feeling discouraged, we get it. But there’s something you can do about it — something we MUST do about it.
Because losing the governorship in Virginia isn’t great, but losing control of the Senate would be catastrophic:
[**_Can you please make a $5 contribution to John Fetterman’s campaign TODAY? It all adds up when everyone is chipping in._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37172?refcode=em20211107-3379&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3379%2E434096%2E-1p1Tz)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37172?refcode=em20211107-3379&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3379%2E434096%2E-1p1Tz)**
Thank you,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211107-3379-footer&t=22&refcode2=3379_434096_-1p1Tz&akid=3379%2E434096%2E-1p1Tz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Team Booker
subject: Yesterday’s historic announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Yesterday, Charles made a historic announcement: the Kentucky New Deal.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12695?refcode=em20211107-1205&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1205%2E346206%2Ek0ZWP5 ]Charles speaking on podium

Kentuckians helped build this country — and the deal was that for our
service and our sacrifice, we would be fairly treated. We would be able to
live full and gainful lives, feed our families, and have a pathway to
prosperity.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12695?refcode=em20211107-1205&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1205%2E346206%2Ek0ZWP5 ]Charles Booker with a supporter

But over the years, the promises of this deal have been gutted. Gutted by
politicians like Rand Paul, corrupt leaders out for only themselves and
their rich corporate friends. Our families and communities were left
behind.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12695?refcode=em20211107-1205&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1205%2E346206%2Ek0ZWP5 ]Charles holding baby Justyce

But enough is enough, Peter.
Now, we’re rising up and claiming our power, united as one Commonwealth
with the Kentucky New Deal. This time, the deal will be on OUR terms — and
it’ll be the biggest investment in the people of Kentucky we’ve ever seen.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12695?refcode=em20211107-1205&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1205%2E346206%2Ek0ZWP5 ]Kentuckians holding KY New Deal signs

If you’re with us — if you are ready to finally address the deep, lasting
challenges that have crippled our communities — will you join us as we
carry out our bold vision for our Commonwealth?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12695?refcode=em20211107-1205&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1205%2E346206%2Ek0ZWP5 ]Please make a donation of any amount today; we can’t do this without
you.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12695?refcode=em20211107-1205&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=1205%2E346206%2Ek0ZWP5 ]Contribute $5

— Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211107-1205-footer&t=1026&refcode2=1205_346206_k0ZWP5&akid=1205%2E346206%2Ek0ZWP5

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1205%2E346206%2Ek0ZWP5

| Dear Patriot, I want to make sure that you saw this important email that I sent. At the Senate hearing, I pressed Anthony Fauci about his funding of gain-of-function research at the Wuhan lab. And once again, he chose to lie in front of the U.S. Senate. It should be clear to everyone by now -- Anthony Fauci has disqualified himself from any position of public power. And the Department of Justice should investigate him for lying to Congress. But in spite of all that, the Democrats and the Left-wing media continue to protect Anthony Fauci at all costs. And they are gearing up to take me out in my upcoming election as well. If my Bernie-supporting socialist opponent manages to defeat me, who will hold Anthony Fauci accountable? [Please contribute $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away to prevent that nightmare scenario from happening.](https://trk.klclick.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D3Rr4_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7wtQCVq-2FXGLflov9tn2YLdsErEOX-2FtpE1xH9VRBRmHgCGXcm30RVAXI7P0LFxikDUkv6-2BWzDhSlkuKF7N-2Fh-2B-2F4st2Ip-2FziItC1KGVpPqfn9VBjRrscGpcB-2F27tIJOh6lLG2xpU80aSDcwi1x0nt0616WmLZuDk3lAB3A-2FpWV9vUhy5KD1lSOhBuhu1-2BDh576EdTgVojTtCIdHfOWoubK-2F-2FbxIhTf8xzM1l9MrGsI9gKzPz2ncEwG7ze5Yeb-2ByaBDthUz9yJAQ6aC4AyTBObtQajDHKHFyxfX-2BYQjZB1nSVtCIIo8Fd71hGiqVTngJxzrL1n4BajIqcdQga3hNAh-2FMcA-3D-3D) And then, if you haven't already, please read the email below for the latest updates on Anthony Fauci.

| **\------Begin forwarded message------** Dear Patriot, I have a major update for you today. Anthony Fauci went before my Senate committee yesterday morning -- and lied yet again. I thought that perhaps after his own agency, the NIH, admitted to funding gain-of-function research at the Wuhan Institute of Virology, Fauci would find it in himself to tell the truth. But he chose to lie yet again. Does this man realize that the American people have turned against him? No amount of glowing media coverage, or Netflix puff documentaries, can ever prevent Fauci from being judged by history for his actions during this pandemic. What Anthony Fauci has done to this country is disgraceful. He has spent taxpayer dollars paying the "scientists" of a communist regime to create artificial super-viruses. He has spent taxpayer dollars on gruesome experiments that torture innocent beagles. And yet the Biden administration continues to keep this man in their employ, and he continues to be one of the most powerful individuals in the entire country.

body:

Folks, is it hot in here or is it just this dead heat Senate race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5822?t=1007&akid=1352%2E3611125%2EBQ8psU ]Tim doing yoga

I just finished up some hot yoga, but it’s not the only thing that’s got
me sweating lately.

My millionaire opponents and their billionaire backers are mobilizing
against our grassroots campaign.

If we’re going to win this race, we’ve got to take a deep breath and keep
our balance so we can be ready at a moment's notice for whatever they
throw our way.

That means we’ve got to stretch every campaign dollar to maximize our
impact and come out on top.

Look, I'm bending over backwards for Ohio workers, but I'm going to need
your help to make sure we have the resources to flip this Senate seat
blue.

name: Rick Scott
subject: Stand with President Trump!
body:
Tomorrow marks exactly one year until Election Day. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6561%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=HWIDJ4ZHSMsmGSceVbYOpQ&sysid=1)
Fellow conservative, Tomorrow marks _exactly one year_ until **Election Day.**

I won’t mince my words, Fellow conservative - **we must act now if we’re going to take back Trump’s majority in the Senate.**

There is no time to waste. Every single minute takes us closer to the polls, and Democrats are **ramping up their numbers from big tech billionaires.**

Under President Trump, Republicans promised we would _never_ give up on his great vision for America.

I’m determined to keep that promise, but we can’t save America without your help.

**[Join our team today to save America and stand with President Trump.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67803%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VfCGKISJUqItHw%2bxlbWV2w&sysid=1)** **SAVE AMERICA** [**CONTRIBUTE $10**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67804%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HR%2bgfZ1AuhNkHxysdkvkow&sysid=1) [**CONTRIBUTE $25**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67815%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qJ5AwQPDh5bEXnPZxSfNqw&sysid=1) [**CONTRIBUTE $50**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67816%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rbTw%2fsggg%2bmHaAuWY7aD7A&sysid=1) [**CONTRIBUTE $100**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67817%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dtJQHi5xyJ8zd3xs3oesFw&sysid=1) [**CONTRIBUTE $250**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67818%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sg7PiqnE7LsO%2fFZo1W6IJA&sysid=1) [**CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67819%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qwJEEz2nDGtu45EE69OEvA&sysid=1) Thank you, Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Email sent to {{email}} by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: [unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67810%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K6bL0LjsOoJySXfSypcm0A&sysid=1). Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort!
