name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6onhe9fh61v2h66qb8im7sve9khca3alq44vgag_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cph62oj2cjh2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical—same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked “facts” to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation’s history—a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen—echoing what she learned in school. And when she’s challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as **invalid** , **hateful** , and even **racist**. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I’m not surprised—I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation’s history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of “oppression” and “injustice” but an **exceptional nation worth defending**. This young lady is an ** _informed citizen_**. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. **I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership?** You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the State of American Education** using this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/informed-citizen-survey/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhbsfa6egev5arueaufs5inv7sl22tmbhbs09lr8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3cph62oj2cjh2bs) This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it’s too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the “state of knowledge” in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.** The goal of this new campaign we’re leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” either deliberately deceived or who just didn’t receive about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government.** That’s because we’re seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical—same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked “facts” to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Fellow Conservative,

**It’s amazing.** Joe Biden sees enough of an emergency to mandate vaccines right as Afghanistan is collapsing, but it’s not enough of an emergency to put it into effect until after Christmas.

Here’s the truth: **_Joe Biden and the Democrats are playing games with public health._** They continue to make children wear masks even though it’s been shown that children are the **LEAST LIKELY** to become seriously ill, or even infected, from COVID.

Joe Biden is using his **_unconstitutional and illegal_** vaccine mandates to **distract** from the disasters that **HIS** Administration has created.

If you want to support **PRO-FREEDOM PATRIOTS** , then stand with House Conservatives!
[**STAND WITH HOUSE CONSERVATIVES**](http://links.houseconservatives.com/u/click?_t=2f157a537fc642c9aa7481bf474f3189&_m=115adaed16a443f5b70f92243ba3b7d6&_e=okOMm81BD7-51TSvaw7kDOQsAN0AvTKWI_KMQN35XNzkxayUsFkSnsWhmC5NshH8je3TKh8-bBCTiAJcDJLz_j5QZXPswjRLo9G2f2dK5s0b7HXr5fSs2uuhDXHLJLduBUxMuaMMSF4dbMVQBR4gca7rLV_Q4xp9WyUvjKkn6x-oBOHGLXeVlb1RyZReNTy5Nrw8njyUlQfJYRu3D003C66S7-UOtLOMo5iQozuq79no3pFke5tD4_S5NaSBBjgB2yuEJKaMAdmRmYYMXRF5pyE7Nt2psM-ojWg8hYodVIrX5ZTmZT5lJiNxo5JBGnSVo0DzyJf8d1JW_8gXVXcyXq99JxoZUvu5lV6jggJL-ltaezx0ytW3slTTjjS38fRs34WIqRSHObXkZigZ4clXf30HGcH-LzRr1HzGr9wsgifU9RsJbiG25vLR9xFKwkXIAToA303mKL50Nk06Et35udJVMrah87tOJemVzd1VEbg8zj3e3P4MnLWt7HIYrpCU)
Thank you,

Jim Banks, Chairman
House Conservatives Fund

name: Great America Update
subject: Where should I send this?
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6562%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Q2eD7eJK3anDp0w%2fIsHwLQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67827%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tWW3UjYiinnCiXvgxu3mVg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67828%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lkzKzChcVbRxf4LsuxOBig&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67829%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jCNXJpmNiEGXudZS3D%2b7Tg&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67820%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fHnDk3AUn%2bSJDFelkNFefg&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67829%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jCNXJpmNiEGXudZS3D%2b7Tg&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67821%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ViHx5C7BTSPlHUU9L%2bQdrg&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6562%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Q2eD7eJK3anDp0w%2fIsHwLQ&sysid=1)

Hello,
We’re emailing to ask you to give $5 to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate.
Here’s why:**Iowa will be one of the closest races in the country next year, and Senate control is at stake in Mike’s campaign against Grassley. But right now, we’re still 19 donations short of our daily goal and what we need to win.**
Mike’s not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, he’s relying on grassroots donors like you to fund his campaign.
But here’s the truth: We need to hit this goal if we're going to be able to fully fund our campaign to take on Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs. We just can't afford to fall short right now.
**There’s still time for us to make up the difference, but we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**

body:

| | Hi Peter, The Proud Boys — a violent militia group that takes orders from Donald Trump and stormed the Capitol on January 6 — have repeatedly made credible threats on Senator Raphael Warnock's life. Now they're being hailed as heroes by the right-wing media. This week Tucker Carlson launched what he calls a “documentary series” about the insurrection. In reality, the series glorifies Proud Boys, Oath Keepers, and all violent extremists who tried to overturn the results of the 2020 presidential election. Republicans are openly thanking The Proud Boys for handling their dirty work. Meanwhile, members of the Proud Boys have stockpiled over 1,000 rounds of ammunition and threatened Raphael Warnock's life online, writing “Dead men can't pass laws,” and that they will “keep watching for the signal” from Donald Trump. Look, these people aren't playing games. Donald Trump — who urged his Proud Boys supporters to storm the Capitol on January 6 and then delayed calling in the National Guard to give the Proud Boys time and cover — tapped Herschel Walker to oust Warnock. Walker just won endorsements from Mitch McConnell and the entire GOP establishment. Now he's surging in the polls just after raising an unbelievable $3.7 million in the first weeks of his campaign. If Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, but up against the right-wing media's propaganda blitz and Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives, and we're still down $1,250 on our daily fundraising goal. That means Raphael Warnock is in serious trouble. Listen, YOU sent Raphael Warnock to the Senate in the first place, Peter. So it's thanks to you that we have a 50/50 Senate Majority to protect right now. name: Team Josh
subject: Josh Mandel needs your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:

name: Blue Nevada 2022
subject: Crystal Ball just moved NV-SEN to “toss-up”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Pundits are saying it’s anybody’s race.
#
Team,
Right after the Virginia elections were called, Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball moved several Senate seats -- _including one right here in Nevada_ \-- from “Leans Democratic” to the “toss-up” column.
Nevada elections are always close. But it is extremely concerning to see this Senate race shift in the wrong direction. We cannot give an inch or the GOP will gain momentum and paint Nevada red.
**[Will you rush in $5 contribution now to defend our Democratic progress in Nevada?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38400106/315283024/-1515683688?refcode=jr_em_nd_211107_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODkyMWUxOS0yNDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=slM8_5pQjpLEtfFKuVX5bhvu6jsWMLSQ8kK0F8JF4CM=)**

Pundits are saying it’s anybody’s race. _That means it’s up to us_ to defend the Senate majority.
**[Pitch in $5 right away if you’re in the fight to keep Nevada blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38400107/315283025/-1515683688?refcode=jr_em_nd_211107_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODkyMWUxOS0yNDQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=slM8_5pQjpLEtfFKuVX5bhvu6jsWMLSQ8kK0F8JF4CM=)**

clean_body: | | | | | Take my word, folks — I know a close poll when I see one. This new poll that has Steve Sisolak up by only 2 points against Dean Heller isn’t an outlier. We’ve got one hell of a close race on our hands which means I need your help to make sure Steve gets re-elected. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Look, the reality is that you’ll have folks from both sides saying that this poll is a bunch of hoopla and we’re going to watch Steve sail through re-election. Well, that’s not true. Steve Sisolak is the first Democratic governor this state has elected in two decades. And Republicans are fired up because it’s the first midterm election after we gained control of the presidency and both branches of Congress. We’ve got to double their enthusiasm at the polls if we want to keep Steve in office. Steve’s team needs your help to start building their voter coalition for a strong showing on Election Day. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for taking the time to read this. Chat soon, Harry Reid | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. | | Friend, If we can learn anything from the election this week in Virginia, it's that we are going to need to work harder than we have ever before. We knew that 2022 was going to be a tough year for Democrats, and as we saw this week, that will certainly be the case. There were some silver linings, but we need to start organizing and we need to start right now to avoid a similar fate. **Will you pitch in today to help us get our campaign up and running for 2022?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Contribute $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YN2dihPSgtgUyRUaiI-Zh1p4dSYm-dVx4RRgx6DO-Gc=/lPKf-EP7VEEBd1uX7sjmwXm5t_0fppfLwrDAoDuBhrw=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=110421) [**Contribute $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YN2dihPSgtgUyRUaiI-Zh1p4dSYm-dVx4RRgx6DO-Gc=/lPKf-EP7VEEBd1uX7sjmwXm5t_0fppfLwrDAoDuBhrw=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=110421) [**Contribute $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YN2dihPSgtgUyRUaiI-Zh1p4dSYm-dVx4RRgx6DO-Gc=/lPKf-EP7VEEBd1uX7sjmwXm5t_0fppfLwrDAoDuBhrw=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=110421) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YN2dihPSgtgUyRUaiI-Zh1p4dSYm-dVx4RRgx6DO-Gc=/lPKf-EP7VEEBd1uX7sjmwXm5t_0fppfLwrDAoDuBhrw=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=110421) Virginia Democrats came close and just missed the mark, which is yet another reminder that we need to knock on as many doors as we can, raise grassroots party building funds, and organize our friends and neighbors. We need you. Together, we can win. It won't be easy, but it is possible. Please consider making a contribution today so we can protect our House DFL Majority and keep working to build a better future for all Minnesotans. subject: Tackling the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38400499/315286929/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjFkYTliZC0yNzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-iTLW53vpOfEyZ52tBR4ZNwbm1aUqMMJdkVKdx7Lc0=&emci=96af78be-1c40-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a21da9bd-2740-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)

Right now, I’m attending the COP26 global climate summit. I’m here because **it’s past time we address the climate crisis and tackle the hard work ahead.** The United States is already leading by example — announcing major plans to combat climate change by cutting methane emissions in oil and gas operations. I’ve worked hard to introduce and pass legislation to curb carbon emissions and put thousands to work doing it. We’ve had major wins — like paving the way for those strong methane regulations I just mentioned — and we have many more in the works, like major transmission efforts, electrification rebates for consumers, and more. Tackling the existential threat of the climate crisis will take all of us stepping up to do what we can, when we can. I will always do my part to find solutions to the climate crisis — but I’m counting on your support to help make them a reality. **My team is setting a goal of bringing in 100 contributions before I come home from COP26 on Monday. Can you add a donation of any amount to power our efforts to tackle the climate crisis?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38400500/315286930/1569722553?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjFkYTliZC0yNzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-iTLW53vpOfEyZ52tBR4ZNwbm1aUqMMJdkVKdx7Lc0=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38400501/315286931/1569722553?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211107_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjFkYTliZC0yNzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-iTLW53vpOfEyZ52tBR4ZNwbm1aUqMMJdkVKdx7Lc0=)

subject: SB 8 in the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

On Monday, the U.S. Supreme Court heard arguments on the constitutionality
of SB 8 — the restrictive and extreme abortion ban signed into law by
Governor Gregg Abbott earlier this year.

Texas already leads the country in maternal mortality, and now Republicans
have created a system where nearly no one is able to access a safe, legal
abortion. Already, stories are spreading of people traveling hundreds of
miles to obtain reproductive health care and of the immense harm this law
has caused.

It's possible that at least five Supreme Court justices will side with
abortion providers in the case currently before the Supreme Court, but we
cannot rely on a far-right court to defend our rights. We have to protect
them ourselves.

That's why Powered by People is dedicated to getting as many people
involved in our democracy as possible to protect our voting rights,
reproductive rights, and more. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48201?refcode=ema20211107-161646&t=1001&akid=161646%2E444211%2EhLFgzZ ]If you're in this movement, will you
please make a $3 donation to Powered by People today?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48201?refcode=ema20211107-161646&amount=3&t=1020&akid=161646%2E444211%2EhLFgzZ ]Contribute $3

This is an all-out battle for our democracy. Since our founding, Powered
by People has been doing the work to defeat bad actors by organizing over
20,000 volunteers, making over 76 million voter contact attempts, and
registering over 250,000 likely Democratic voters.

Republicans in Texas are not looking out
for the safety or health of Texans — instead, they're focusing on scoring
political points for their extreme actions and currying to Donald Trump's
favor. But no matter what Republicans throw at us, we'll continue this
fight.

Together we can build a better, more responsive government and elect
leaders that truly represent the people of Texas, but we need your
support. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48201?refcode=ema20211107-161646&t=1021&akid=161646%2E444211%2EhLFgzZ ]Will you chip in $3 or more to support our
work to register new voters, fight against GOP attacks on our rights, and
protect our democracy?

Together,

Powered by People

body:
I know it's getting late.

Peter,

I know it’s getting late and you have a lot going on, so I’ll make this quick.

There are less than five hours to go until we close the books on our weekend push, and we are still short of our $12,000 goal. **A donation of $7 or more from you would go a very long way toward making up ground.**

**[I have to ask you one more time: Donate $7 or more to supercharge our momentum, elect Tom, and move our progressive agenda forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38400694/315296699/67334922?refcode=bpi_em_20211107_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGNiYjAyZC0yYzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hwF3M0JPqsSWB3cRYfyjgo_CcifZDjDjO4wMHdb-XBA=)**

Thank you -- I know you get a lot of asks, and I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t critically important to sustaining our campaign and electing Tom.

\-- Haley

Haley Link Krogman
Deputy Campaign Manager
Tom Perez for Maryland

name: Jesse Sullivan
subject: Fox News Op-Ed: why we haven’t solved our crime problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
I took to the editorial pages of Fox News to lay out why things have gotten so bad in our cities - and how we can do better. And it all starts with [](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=ba919756d627423fa897a9515d019292&_e=5rPpvJT8Trb8wMF8bxOEpBSB9Lnmzmk1AjySIq1bJWajAyZYbvBrHLypS0DBH3G3UKxNa7GOR1d2L64VJ0Ijb1dNzo7KZPQNMwpGdCYCmURTlyZVmcIPzc8tIbKpvuqdHEk_LTp8CquHRrDdz5wCCj1eFXgBAEpYbYkZkyf53b867loiYIIMcFQ2GVRoEvcXkmuamjz9lSA34aja-COts2Wkp6nbJiKbzFol5R0COry4-EOsN5wcUllRidBSy8jv6MW7cUU64kXOnV3PQVWicIDNyGTOl5BkKe1FOY9K5AKphneo_2fohBFL4GmnLEph-euGi7Tq4_it4liJ6_kPXqfoLvw9qg5rYj0Y_iKI9C4paF2AXdUAuhsDIFSKw27p_VR2b46DCA4X1yEpjbW2Wjco5L1L_vZ_f7B8w8l84BTHtyjSozEHZN86AIuNssjvKwW79drhOJOLzDGGwioTvDTYVcXrn8BaZNUiWU8RNE4eVwrFmJyR27qs0c2gxPjxwlmyN-5ROy5D0wicFBCITQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Friend,

I have worked in some of the most violent, crime-ridden, and corrupt cities on earth, including Port-au-Prince, Haiti; Lagos, Nigeria; and Helmand, Afghanistan.

And I hate to say it, but I must: **_What I’ve seen in our cities across Illinois echoes what I’ve seen around the world._**

I took to the editorial pages of Fox News to lay out why things have gotten so bad in our cities - and how we can do better. And it all starts with leadership.

At a time when the Illinois government is overreaching into our lives, our homes, and our schools, it is pulling back on its most sacred obligation: keeping us safe.

**I cannot stand by as my state becomes more and more reminiscent of the corrupt warzones I’ve seen. It’s why I’m running for governor.**

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: an update from on the ground in Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, Peter – it's been a busy week on the campaign trail, but I have a couple spare minutes, so I want to share a quick update from on the ground in Iowa.
Just recently, I spoke to voters all across our state: Council Bluffs, Denison, Sioux City, Audubon, Ankeny and Des Moines. People shared their stories and their hopes for Iowa's future – and it's clear we've got a lot of work to do. But these conversations are what get me up each day to keep working as hard as I can to defeat Sen. Grassley. (**[You can donate to my campaign and help us get across the finish line here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38400960/315304907/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk274-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGE5OWRmNy0yZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yK6Ts55GlGfcc4ZbRAbxluL_U4bhmDB-QR_-1j6lZ2U=)**)
You see, after over 40 years in Washington, Sen. Grassley has completely lost touch with Iowans. He doesn't understand their concerns and he doesn't listen to their needs – even when it's making national headlines. **Just the other week, when asked about the John Deere UAW workers' strike, Sen. Grassley claimed he hadn't even heard that workers were on strike.**
Peter, this is completely unacceptable and frankly – as the daughter of a union pipefitter-welder – it makes my blood boil.
The people striking are our neighbors and our family, not people to be ignored or looked down upon. Last week, I was proud to meet and stand with our UAW brothers and sisters who are striking for a better life, fair wages and fair retirements – not only for themselves but for future generations.
Working families in Iowa are _my_ family, and they deserve so much better. Sen. Grassley's Washington elitism makes me more determined than ever to defeat him.
From fighting for working families to protecting our Senate majority, there's so much on the line in this race, so I've got to ask you: If you're with me to defeat Sen. Grassley, can you pitch in whatever you can spare to get us back on track? Here's the best link: **[secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38400961/315304917/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk274-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGE5OWRmNy0yZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yK6Ts55GlGfcc4ZbRAbxluL_U4bhmDB-QR_-1j6lZ2U=)**
Every dollar gets us closer to defeating Sen. Grassley and flipping Iowa blue. Thank you for all that you do.

– Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38400962/315304932/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk274-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGE5OWRmNy0yZjQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yK6Ts55GlGfcc4ZbRAbxluL_U4bhmDB-QR_-1j6lZ2U=)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: This is a long email, and by the time you’re done reading it, I hope you’ll be as ready as I am to flip Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat from red to blue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hello everyone, this is a long email, but I hope you will take the time to read it.

We’re about a year from Election Day, and I’ve been thinking a lot about what this race means and why I got in. I’ve never had more hope that we can give Wisconsin families leadership they can trust to get things done, and I want you to know why:

**When I first ran for public office, I was a political unknown who decided to take on the most powerful Republican in Wisconsin: Scott Walker.** You see, Walker and his powerful allies tried to eliminate the State Treasurer’s office — a critical check and balance on our government. I stood up when others wouldn’t, led a bipartisan campaign to stop Walker’s power grab, and we won with 62% of the vote statewide.

**It was the kind of landslide victory you just don’t see in Wisconsin** — and it didn’t end there. I took Walker and his allies on again to run for State Treasurer. I traveled the state to spread our campaign’s message of ensuring transparency in our government, protecting Wisconsin’s vulnerable communities, and holding big corporations and politicians like Walker accountable.

**Our message resonated with the people of Wisconsin, and against all odds, I won my second statewide election** — flipping nine Trump counties and winning by a larger margin than the Governor, Lt. Governor, and the Attorney General. I share all of this to remind you that, when we focus on the issues that bring Wisconsinites together, we win. Then, we get to work.

**My first major act after being elected was to lift a Republican gag order on climate change.** It prevented us from even considering the climate crisis when making decisions on the investment of over $1.2 billion in state assets. We put a stop to that, and now, environmental factors are considered with every investment we make. On top of that, we also continued to ensure communities across Wisconsin had financing for infrastructure, broadband expansion, renewable energy projects, and more.

When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, Robin Vos and the Republican legislature refused to meet for 300 days and Ron Johnson was busy spreading dangerous conspiracy theories. They didn’t give a damn about the millions of Wisconsinites struggling to make ends meet, but I did. So, I got scrappy, and **I stepped up to help provide millions of dollars in relief to Wisconsin schools and communities** — leading the first-ever special distribution of $5.25 million to address the remote learning challenges students and teachers were facing.

**Most recently, I have been working with Governor Tony Evers to secure $92.7 million for Wisconsinites at risk of losing their homes.** Our Homeowner’s Task Force has gone beyond just making recommendations, we’re getting things done — piloting the COVID-19 Foreclosure Prevention Fund in La Crosse and creating a statewide network called Take Root Wisconsin to help folks buy, fix, and stay in their homes.

Here’s why all of this is so important: **The people of our state deserve nothing less from their representatives than someone who shows up in their communities, listens to their concerns, asks how they can help, and gets the job done.** That’s what I've done as State Treasurer, and it’s exactly what I'll do in the U.S. Senate.

All my life, I’ve been underestimated, but I’ve never been intimidated. When I took on the most powerful Republican in Wisconsin, I won — twice. Now, I’m ready to defeat Ron Johnson and give our working families someone they can trust to actually fight for them in Washington.

[**If you’re with me in this, I need you to add a small donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate today — because there’s a lot of work to be done, and I could really use your help. Any amount that is meaningful and possible for you would be appreciated, and it would make a big difference in this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38401215/315310331/1201999653?refcode=em21_211107_long_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211107_long_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEwNTM4Mi0zYzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POLO53aNvcs-KdAdj2VlRkSWWTHZUmXrLaM3YCo02ck=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38401216/315310332/1201999653?refcode=em21_211107_long_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211107_long_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWEwNTM4Mi0zYzQwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POLO53aNvcs-KdAdj2VlRkSWWTHZUmXrLaM3YCo02ck=)

This is a critical moment that requires us to stand up and fight hard for our values, especially in the face of politicians like Ron Johnson who govern by conspiracy theory and obstruct meaningful change. I believe we can — and must — do better.

Together, we can make sure all Wisconsinites have access to affordable health care regardless of any pre-existing conditions. We can make sure folks never have to worry about choosing between life-saving prescription drugs or putting food on the table.

We can expand broadband access in every community to ensure parents don’t have to sit in a parking lot just so their kids can do homework. And we can build a future where paid leave, affordable childcare, and universal pre-k are guaranteed so that families have a little extra breathing room.

**Those are the values I’m fighting for in this campaign, and quite frankly, they shouldn’t be too much to ask for.**

If you’re still reading this, thank you for taking the time. I know you’re here because you believe our future is worth fighting for. Let's go win this fight.

— Sarah

body:
Top scientist reveals Trump Administration could have reduced COVID deaths by 40% >>

| | _**BREAKING:
Top COVID-19 scientist reveals Trump Administration could have reduced COVID deaths up to 40%**_

| We're horrified.

When Donald Trump left office in January, nearly 400,000 Americans had died because of COVID-19.

**Now one of the Administration 's top health advisors is saying Trump's Administration could have prevented as much as 40% of those deaths.******

[**Quickly, let us know you CONDEMN Trump for his negligent response to COVID-19.**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Petition Signature: [SIGN ON >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_)
| [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)
---

**This is horrifying.**

By the time Donald Trump left office earlier this year, nearly **400,000** Americans had died from COVID-19.

But now, a top scientist who helped advise Trump's COVID-19 response just revealed the Administration could have prevented nearly _**40% of those deaths**_ if they hadn't been so consumed with the 2020 election.

Instead of working to prevent these deaths, Donald Trump was busy...

_\--**UNDERMINING** our science-based response to this deadly virus to avoid responsibility.

\-- **SPREADING** lies and conspiracy theories about his election loss to soothe his own ego.

\-- And **INCITING** a deadly insurrection at our nation's Capitol to maintain his grip on power._

**Worst of all, we know it could happen all over again** \-- _because as we write this, Trump appears to be exploring a second run for the White House._

We will fight to keep him out of power. **But we can 't do it without you.**

[**That 's why we need to know: Do you CONDEMN Donald Trump for his negligent response to COVID-19?**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-cg~)
| [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)
---
Thanks,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Nick4WA HQ
subject: We have officially entered the 2022 primaries.
body:
Help us reach our goal.

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_goal&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, We have just officially entered the 2022 Primary season. We have set a goal of $2000 this month, and we need your help to reach it. **[We don't have a big goal this month as we are a grassroots movement. But we must reach every person. We need your help to achieve this goal. Can you donate $25 right now?](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvoWehcotF6bNMjEX56A5Y_Pl9jUexjCgMH1X6KZfeQXlkloUAvcM697e2VtaodqAY&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_goal&n=2)** [](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvoWehcotF6bNMjEX56A5Y_Pl9jUexjCgMH1X6KZfeQXlkloUAvcM697e2VtaodqAY&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_goal&n=3) Here is where we stand on Week one of the 2022 Primaries:
1. Our Support is growing every day!
2. We had a record number of campaign donations last month.
* While we didn't meet our goal, we have you to thank for getting us closer than ever!
3. We are growing our volunteer base.
* Want to volunteer? [Sign up here](https://www.nick4wa.com/volunteer?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_goal&n=4)
4. What we are fighting for
* Police Reform (Not Defund)
* Medicare for all
* Education Equity
* Voting Rights
* Ending Racism
* Gun Violence Prevention
* Ending Poverty
* Ending Addiction
* Criminal Justice Reform
* Indigenous Rights
* Climate Action
* LGBTQIA+ Rights
* Ending Domestic Terror
* Taking care of our Veterans, Service Members, and their families.
5. Could you help us spread the word?

* [Share our movement with others and earn points.](https://www.nick4wa.com/spread_the_word?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_goal&n=5) (We are working on the way to redeem these points.)

We are making progress but we still have a long way to go and very little time to get there. I am optimistic we can win and it will be with your help that we do that. [We are ten months from Primary Election night here in Washington, and we need your help to secure it. Can you donate $25 right now to help stay on track for our goal this month?](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvoWehcotF6bNMjEX56A5Y_Pl9jUexjCgMH1X6KZfeQXlkloUAvcM697e2VtaodqAY&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=november_goal&n=6) clean_body: Help us reach our goal. | Dear Peter, We have just officially entered the 2022 Primary season. We have set a goal of $2000 this month, and we need your help to reach it. Here is where we stand on Week one of the 2022 Primaries: 1. Our Support is growing every day! 2. We had a record number of campaign donations last month. While we didn't meet our goal, we have you to thank for getting us closer than ever! 3. We are growing our volunteer base. Want to volunteer? 4. What we are fighting for Police Reform (Not Defund) Medicare for all Education Equity Voting Rights Ending Racism Gun Violence Prevention Ending Poverty Ending Addiction Criminal Justice Reform Indigenous Rights Climate Action LGBTQIA+ Rights Ending Domestic Terror Taking care of our Veterans, Service Members, and their families. 5. Could you help us spread the word? (We are working on the way to redeem these points.) We are making progress but we still have a long way to go and very little time to get there. I am optimistic we can win and it will be with your help that we do that. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Nicolaus for U.S. Senate Campaign Team Our mailing address is:** CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 Copyright © 2021 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved. Peter,

Americans resoundingly rejected the Democrats' far-left agenda and failed leadership in state and local elections around the country on November 2nd.

This was just a preview of the massive losses Democrats will suffer in 2022, **and among the top targets for Republicans to defeat is my opponent:** Democrat Congresswoman Katie Porter in California's 45th District - a swing seat.

**Porter is a self-proclaimed socialist who is to the left of Maxine Waters.**

_In fact, Katie Porter is so extreme that Maxine Waters even kicked her off of a Congressional committee!_

When Katie Porter is not going on late night talk shows, appearing in glossy magazines like _Vanity Fair_ , or grandstanding while attacking CEOs, she's voting with The Squad and pushing Medicare-For-All, the Green New Deal, trillions in wasteful spending, and tax increases.

Peter, **this race is one of the top targets that Republicans need to win to take back the House.** It's going to take nationwide grassroots support, just like it took to flip Virginia red.

[**Will you help me defeat far-left Katie Porter and flip this swing House seat with a donation of $25, $50, $100 or even more?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7b2fc5147ce54e92b4e9fbff709123e4&_e=kXMsE3CFw3H7OqhqkIVWhWq6V3nJUrrtgZzcheMaZme-7pScbR8JmNutqntIZkgzYWEn-OXOGF5Z0iQvhNkhxXZ9EgnUFBTxnEKhdwubNDdMNJVPcePz8PWM9kFovStu7pJd5Mjxw8DBXMtw0atbmq4Qg3XCesutQiSvPKQpMCesuZp8kkE2v-VFkVK8VM0XNMt1OZuuft_uqbwYheITE8WlgPI3vRpPnQagPNXcmyyuupVP7Oi4O8R2LFjwqOiXI5IG1ZPmZwCZS9S_HfRDSzB_tUJz8-fQWabqbPfdb01QneGx7DitAGqJ49M20WtTRNBR5T2sMHSlEI9kfLyRKQ-R_T__y8l7cMVdRJk7MN0sMrulwxy-hGODr9yS4v0ELK2Ru2JvNaAZ1tbqL2Azc3UiCZF7y3Nz0ZQsbnnkPHrhn346EUTe1jmXf4x378PFKKTDDbZDQ6PsSa7Zm816og%3D%3D)

As a black kid who grew up with divorced parents in a disadvantaged Dallas neighborhood, I had every reason to think I couldn't achieve the American Dream - **but I didn't let that stop me.**

Thanks to sports, I attended Rice University - where I played Division-1 basketball - and then Law School at the University of Texas at Austin.

I eventually enlisted in the United States Navy and **volunteered for a combat tour of duty in Afghanistan.**

While stationed in Kabul City, Afghanistan, I coordinated with Special Forces units to help them identify and capture suspected terroist suicide bombers.

_**I was even a target of two suicide bomb attacks and was blessed to survive.**_

Now, my wife - who immigrated to America as a young refugee from war-torn Lebanon - and I are raising our four kids to live out their own American Dream.

But politicians like Katie Porter are only making it harder. They're increasing government control over our lives, adding to our national debt, raising taxes, driving up the cost of living, and all while failing to fulfill government's most basic role: keeping us secure and safe.

**Removing far-left politicians and failed leaders like Katie Porter from Congress is just as important as flipping this swing seat.**

[**Will you ensure we can take advantage of the momentum from these recent victories and chip in $25, $50, $100 or even more to help me defeat Katie Porter and win back a Republican House majority?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7b2fc5147ce54e92b4e9fbff709123e4&_e=kXMsE3CFw3H7OqhqkIVWhWq6V3nJUrrtgZzcheMaZme-7pScbR8JmNutqntIZkgzYWEn-OXOGF5Z0iQvhNkhxXZ9EgnUFBTxnEKhdwubNDdMNJVPcePz8PWM9kFovStu7pJd5Mjxw8DBXMtw0atbmq4Qg3XCesutQiSvPKQpMCesuZp8kkE2v-VFkVK8VM0XNMt1OZuuft_uqbwYheITE8WlgPI3vRpPnQagPNXcmyyuupVP7Oi4O8R2LFjwqOiXgkTimPut_l3aB80ezUzAVl6MlBuGIwssnqecbuffV_XQgFlZ_cklDQoMT11O2oPaIfAr75DlaoGluJV5WOTqteTqkMOakdjph3_cDjAPhPMr429523-2AL9Iqsx7vMtqux1O3mdmFwVnPFDxRBXOxlNHB3E_dEwfSx-LLxqReBU69c-SzrBzxFzPTdGyHKacSXcotENByb6LOoZCREBZFQ%3D%3D)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Momentum now, not later
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Early voting for our first 2022 primary is only 3 months away. Justice
Democrat Jessica Cisneros is taking on anti-abortion corporate Democrat
Henry Cuellar in Texas’ 28th Congressional District.

As soon as polls open and mail ballots arrive to voters in TX-28, we need
to ensure folks are ready to elect Jessica — a progressive fighter for the
people. Cuellar is backed by Wall Street, Exxon, private prisons, and
votes against abortion rights, immigrant justice, and stronger labor
protections. He’s the most conservative Democrat in the House. We need to
defeat Cuellar.

Jessica can win this race. But here’s the thing: Nearly 90% of
Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more money. Most
recent data shows that Cuellar has more than *$2 million* in his campaign
account. Jessica has just a fraction of that, but with our support and the
support of grassroots donors like you, we can still win.

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s opponent in 2018 spent at least 5 times more
than she did in the primary election. AOC won because she was what NY-14
needed, had a strong campaign, and a strong message. We helped her build
that campaign.

We’re doing the same thing for Jessica’s campaign, but we don’t know if we
can get outspent 5-to-1 and still come out on top. The Wall Street, fossil
fuel, and corporate PAC money will keep flowing to Cuellar as primary day
approaches. We’re relying on a flood of grassroots donations — $5, $27,
$50, whatever folks can afford — to help us close this fundraising gap.

The political establishment will do absolutely everything it can to stop
more Justice Democrats from winning a seat in Congress. Corporate
Democrats don’t want to see Jessica and her support for Medicare for All
and a Green New Deal unseat their friend, Rep. Cuellar.

So, Peter, can you
make your first
contribution to defeat Cuellar and elect more Justice Democrats?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83235?refcode=em20211107-20382&t=1002&akid=20382%2E1203867%2Eif74Q4 ]→ Yes, I can donate $3 to Justice Democrats today to
elect Jessica and defeat the most conservative Democrat in the House.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Early voting for our first 2022 primary is only 3 months away. Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros is taking on anti-abortion corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar in Texas’ 28th Congressional District. As soon as polls open and mail ballots arrive to voters in TX-28, we need to ensure folks are ready to elect Jessica — a progressive fighter for the people. Cuellar is backed by Wall Street, Exxon, private prisons, and votes against abortion rights, immigrant justice, and stronger labor protections. He’s the most conservative Democrat in the House. We need to defeat Cuellar. Jessica can win this race. But here’s the thing: Nearly 90% of Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more money. Most recent data shows that Cuellar has more than $2 million in his campaign account. Jessica has just a fraction of that, but with our support and the support of grassroots donors like you, we can still win. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s opponent in 2018 spent at least 5 times more than she did in the primary election. AOC won because she was what NY-14 needed, had a strong campaign, and a strong message. We helped her build that campaign. We’re doing the same thing for Jessica’s campaign, but we don’t know if we can get outspent 5-to-1 and still come out on top. The Wall Street, fossil fuel, and corporate PAC money will keep flowing to Cuellar as primary day approaches. We’re relying on a flood of grassroots donations — $5, $27, $50, whatever folks can afford — to help us close this fundraising gap. The political establishment will do absolutely everything it can to stop more Justice Democrats from winning a seat in Congress. Corporate Democrats don’t want to see Jessica and her support for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal unseat their friend, Rep. Cuellar. body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e83ae0f17b794e698144757f51f29be9&_e=lCEYDz6KW3XavymyMAzW96vbTQGWCPE_sGDSliEHzSQuqYwVpMr9Z6w76Rc5uv6vbuKkavjX2KaHKGpNOnEH0NRGpAt0vip_iihJ3A2bAyMjY0MbAwZze2Aaguq5m4XMhW7ewilAth2RPuCNcN-Uckbc4-EkwtCaMEAqD-yk-BZH3QaoWy8c1hNoKrhQEugiyJoVULbEk9JEBKmdCg3gphMgiS_A8T7HJZY-g4MTuf0cPy1hfyXlKIQdNi4Q3jtn_klaNJkOOqQvczWI0CgkX0FD_8YioOZm0SHQBeL_RuByHE-zFi1nrNiW_qh6mmPuKfF-zzDVcKH7Ma6qPMo2Is6NK9f5ySJkiA4VWkwDbu0pW8OHEVOI-EzOcv0yHG4m)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e83ae0f17b794e698144757f51f29be9&_e=lCEYDz6KW3XavymyMAzW96vbTQGWCPE_sGDSliEHzSQuqYwVpMr9Z6w76Rc5uv6vbuKkavjX2KaHKGpNOnEH0NRGpAt0vip_iihJ3A2bAyMjY0MbAwZze2Aaguq5m4XMhW7ewilAth2RPuCNcN-UctEo9ZkfnKGz9s753j55wScDIDEOulPEHPNWjmKXSkXwVbCr7SwAeiXJKa-ULyCRxCCahpTty72PM95DBRKx2nhey5AFWghif_BSkOb4gvPZChzCm_pjvtj5DD1bQYRJLAq9ThaMBLDp8nmEc4AtFrAiM3vQPnyDm9YaDLSwvYUeevpn3-lTDQ4Ie7e_NF33xatnxGAxvg9VszOE2U_USng5b1goz0ngSSGnMGLPMlV4)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e83ae0f17b794e698144757f51f29be9&_e=lCEYDz6KW3XavymyMAzW96vbTQGWCPE_sGDSliEHzSQuqYwVpMr9Z6w76Rc5uv6vbuKkavjX2KaHKGpNOnEH0NRGpAt0vip_iihJ3A2bAyMjY0MbAwZze2Aaguq5m4XMhW7ewilAth2RPuCNcN-UcjVfa2slxeZ5LrQpJRzE4OLbp86dT6Ja1W4J9CofKntpF8WS8A_4ZxoxWvjrVP-Q24lFuAxIU4r9g1JMmvum5IsXTS6dNFL1NxE4fY8DUZgwUFyE9CqlWa05bzQiYCTX2pBjG0s6agAwtjofQQU2MSsWG6GDPowPzmDC9F64WUI2FwQ22mahNrUoRx2re4MbCiu33sXJFvvQ-daU-9YolPJvduhrNo2hubW3KkqgYgOa)

**[Your donation,](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e83ae0f17b794e698144757f51f29be9&_e=lCEYDz6KW3XavymyMAzW96vbTQGWCPE_sGDSliEHzSQuqYwVpMr9Z6w76Rc5uv6vbuKkavjX2KaHKGpNOnEH0NRGpAt0vip_iihJ3A2bAyMjY0MbAwZze2Aaguq5m4XMhW7ewilAth2RPuCNcN-UcnB4SqKREeN8GJUtt-72Z8YWtxnapaL0TAAsEUzlNfQTBnyMYoQhf6nxJEXvPSJtJ8n-Jozo9JZ9-aU9RrlUR9CH6Q6SQ2WoYh_IW9DsqLC9c8iYc9xWjJUWaIvXEW5qbwWp6fXTAmyaiQbaOXW8K7s3IW5aiTJrRlsGE3owgaOANwxQF9wqspIeuirhRDBzyI3iG95SvL2S6EvzhX0PEZwG-0KFz9FniI2i40EITLj2)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e83ae0f17b794e698144757f51f29be9&_e=lCEYDz6KW3XavymyMAzW96vbTQGWCPE_sGDSliEHzSQuqYwVpMr9Z6w76Rc5uv6vbuKkavjX2KaHKGpNOnEH0NRGpAt0vip_iihJ3A2bAyMjY0MbAwZze2Aaguq5m4XMhW7ewilAth2RPuCNcN-UcoznsIsSxCfhZJFObRAvUlVn4AB-0nGO-l50zQOaEdl5XVNQXxuxhLVsah3hAEp2wHG4_GduUfVruY2GLwlccsuYI72wmZSvdqNn4oaVLEDxeb5tYsiLnEd2fdgNizImPwMyl_BVHaxCKls8-wF7IeYyUrdKLYwA6oALwLRWz_hZGp6twDUp7ts3lPmdP-XdwaUgQQFMNBDJL6KZet5b_AlDg8QuUvzdiLlPnXg4dpm0)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e83ae0f17b794e698144757f51f29be9&_e=lCEYDz6KW3XavymyMAzW96vbTQGWCPE_sGDSliEHzSQuqYwVpMr9Z6w76Rc5uv6vbuKkavjX2KaHKGpNOnEH0NRGpAt0vip_iihJ3A2bAyMjY0MbAwZze2Aaguq5m4XMhW7ewilAth2RPuCNcN-UcklRCVghKPyrUUH5Sf6tpez3TUw6L2luXVeWpPN2RwRWX78riNMzZntazUjbfKc-BSSdhNqSnuWw2_91uLJskIZNqnaz09c9JrXNZnpegrKzaO-Zq9RtZqHCtbAahfns2Hw6IiGFoeII7GcGWPK7u-a2VxA7NqR3khZiUWiuTYb9_nnjPaxvg7DfKkCZmy-ek-sZRUjLNAh5UstZv2qctJGdVvmDRTHdsoheQg9Lx9Tr)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,

The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties. whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years. My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job. I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic. Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down. No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built. Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by: Forcing critical race theory into our schools. Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts. Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY. That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that ** You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country. I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people! For Liberty, Jim | | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015
